Name: Akros
Description:
Akros is a cutting-edge organization that establishes data-driven and technologically appropriate systems to improve the health and well-being of disadvantaged communities. We pride ourselves in our ground-level knowledge of the service delivery systems where we work, and our ability to provide novel, lasting solutions implemented in developing regions. Akros works hand in hand with government to develop and implement solutions which ensure ownership and sustainability. In water, sanitation & hygiene (WASH) Akros has revolutionized M&E in sub-Saharan Africa through development of a village-level surveillance system that captures live, real-time data and drives information back down to key stakeholders and change agents through robust feedback loops. The Akros team has also applied these same principles to develop the systems for monitoring  indoor residual spray structure tracking for malaria, school-based access to sanitation and student performance, and participation of adolescent girls and young women through HIV programs, among others.

Akros works with a broad range of donors, partners and stakeholders to pursue this mission, including USAID, UNICEF, Governments, and Traditional Leaders. The breadth of Akros’ projects have enabled our teams to establish working relationships at the sub-national and community levels in all ten provinces in Zambia, across nearly 40,000 villages as well as at the central level in Angola, Botswana, Gambia, Kenya, Malawi, Mozambique, Namibia, Rwanda, Senegal, South Africa, Swaziland and Zimbabwe. Although we work across the Southern Africa region, the majority of Akros’ staff members are based in Lusaka, Zambia.

Name: Ultra Ethernet Consortium
Description:
Ultra Ethernet Consortium (UEC) is bringing together leading companies for industry-wide cooperation to build a complete Ethernet-based communication stack architecture for high-performance networking. Artificial Intelligence (AI) and High-Performance Computing (HPC) workloads are rapidly evolving and require best-in-class functionality, performance, interoperability and total cost of ownership, without sacrificing developer and end-user friendliness. The Ultra Ethernet solution stack will capitalize on Ethernet’s ubiquity and flexibility for handling a wide variety of workloads while being scalable and cost-effective.  

Ultra Ethernet Consortium is founded by companies with long-standing history and experience in high-performance solutions. Each member is contributing significantly to the broader ecosystem of high-performance in an egalitarian manner. The founding members include AMD, Arista, Broadcom, Cisco, Eviden (an Atos Business), HPE, Intel, Meta and Microsoft, who collectively have decades of networking, AI, cloud and high-performance computing-at-scale deployments.

Name: ASKOM Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Over many years in business the ASKOM company has gathered extensive know-how and experience in the field of integrating various process control / production management systems (MOM) and manufacturing various software for industry. Our competences allow us to offer our Customers benefits of one-stop solutions that optimally integrate production systems with management systems in order to minimize production costs and to maximize production efficiency. 
For many years we have been SIEMENS business partner. As the authorized Solution Specialist in the scope of factory automation systems and Smart Expert Partner in the scope of MOM production management systems (under SIEMENS Digital Industries Software) we offer comprehensive production automation solutions based on Totally Integrated Automation (TIA) platform. Such solutions may consist of SIMATIC PLC controller systems, SCADA / HMI SIMATIC WinCC visualization systems,  SIMATIC PCS7 distributed control systems (DCS) including SIMATIC BATCH process control systems, all integrated with unique Opcenter MOM production management platform including production planning and scheduling (APS), manufacturing execution (MES) and quality management (QMS/LIMS).
We offer design and delivery of turn-key control systems for individual machines, production lines, industrial processes and/or entire industrial plants. We integrate our solutions using products of globally renown suppliers of field instrumentation, PLC controllers, DCS systems, MOM/MES systems. Besides the Siemens Opcenter and TIA platforms, we use in our projects various other components including (i) GE Fanuc, Rockwell Automation, Beckhoff and Wago controllers; (ii) Aveva IAS/InTouch and Proficy iFIX SCADA systems; (iii) ValmetDNA DCS systems. 
ASKOM ref. list includes nearly 700 control systems for complex objects.
Since 1995 ASKOM has been developing and marketing Asix – a HMI/SCADA/MES-class software sold in nearly 14.000 licenses to various customers in Poland.

Name: DesignlensUX
Description:
DesignlensUX | AI-Powered UX Benchmarking & Digital Experience Intelligence
DesignlensUX is an AI-driven platform that automates UI/UX evaluation for e-commerce and digital-first brands. We replace slow, manual, and subjective UX audits with fast, objective, and research-backed insights.
Using a hybrid AI architecture—combining Computer Vision, NLP, and a proprietary e-commerce–trained LLM—we evaluate websites across 300+ UX parameters and deliver instant benchmarking reports. Our platform highlights usability gaps, visual hierarchy issues, and design priorities to help teams improve conversions and customer experience.
Beyond benchmarking, DesignlensUX also offers:
• Detailed UI/UX Analysis – In-depth evaluation of layout, visual design, and usability.
• User Journey Evaluation – Analysis of onboarding, PLP, PDP, cart, checkout, and payment flows.
• UI Testing – Detecting friction points, inconsistencies, and interaction issues across key user journeys.
Built on a framework derived from 100+ global UX research studies, DesignlensUX enables brands, startups, UX designers, and product teams to design smarter, measure better, and improve faster using data-driven intelligence.

Name: Nexus-IA
Description:
Nexus est un projet d'IA française dont l'objectif est de repenser notre rapport à la technologie.

Une technologie au service de l'Humain ? oui !
L'Humain dépendant de la technologie ? Non !

Une technologie avec des valeurs de bienveillance, de transparence, d'accessibilité et d'éthique ? Oui !
L'Humain qui perd le sens de ses responsabilités ? Non !

Nexus a donc, vous l'aurez compris, vocation à respecter et à protéger la diginité et la vie humaine, en rappelant à chaque utilisateur que chacun de ses actes a des conséquences (positives comme négatives).

Nous nous reposons beaucoup trop sur la technologie, aujourd'hui, pour justifier de nos actes. Cela doit cesser.
Assumons qui nous sommes et ce que nous faisons.

C'est l'idée de la création de Nexus et toute bonne volonté est la bienvenue ! :)

Merci d'avance pour votre soutien !

PS : je n'ai ni la prétention de me définir ni comme développeur/ingénieur en développement informatique ni en IA. Je ne suis pas spécialisé dans ces domaines. Mais j'ai ce projet qui me tient à cœur et j'ai besoin de m'entourer de spécialistes dans ces domaines, de rêveurs, et de toute personne à qui ce projet parlera profondément. Merci d'avance à tou(te)s pour vos contributions ! :)

Name: My DIBS
Description:
DIBS platform has been launched by Truecopy Credentials Pvt Ltd. DIBS is a neutral platform that lets creators claim possession of their creations by getting them timestamped by Truecopy. Any creator can call dibs on their work-in-progress versions of creatives to show the progression of possession.
When creators call dibs, they receive a digitally signed certificate with the file's details and a timestamp. The certificate is tamper-proof and provides concrete proof of possession at a specific date and time.
DIBS isn't just another social media platform; it's a unique service designed to make "staking your claim" more fun and user-friendly.

Name: Molecule Systems
Description:
Molecule Systems is the execution layer for the distributed grid.

As distributed energy scales, scheduling and visibility are no longer enough. DERs only become permanent grid infrastructure when they deliver utility-grade performance. Molecule provides the execution infrastructure that makes that possible.

Our edge-first software platform enables reliable, deterministic control of distributed energy resources across any device type, manufacturer, or protocol, turning fragmented assets into coordinated, grid-trusted systems.

Delivered as Infrastructure-as-a-Service (IaaS), Molecule embeds within OEM hardware and operates as the missing execution layer, converting schedules, market signals, and control logic into real-world performance. We separate intent from execution, allowing partners to define control intelligence and strategy while Molecule turns it into real-world performance.

Scheduling is static. Operations are dynamic.
Legacy VPPs act like booking agents: they reserve capacity and hope assets respond when called. Molecule acts as the site operator, accountable for real-time behavior and outcomes.

Who we serve

OEMs
Ship grid-ready systems with lifecycle control, remote updates, and durable participation in grid services without building or maintaining a full software stack.

Utilities & grid operators
Operate DER portfolios that behave less like voluntary demand response and more like dependable infrastructure, with predictable, verifiable performance suitable for planning and operations.

Developers, asset owners & aggregators
Turn portfolios into responsive, revenue-generating fleets through execution-grade control that holds up under real operating conditions.

Through DividendVPP, our white-labeled VPP offering, partners convert participation into performance, unlocking higher realized earnings through scalable, OEM-led deployment.

Molecule is where scheduling becomes operations, and where distributed energy becomes infrastructure.

Name: Riada Tech
Description:
نحن شركة تطوير تطبيقات الهاتف المحمول ذات الانتشار العالمي ، ومتخصصون في تقديم تطبيقات متنوعة للشركات في جميع أنحاء العالم. تأسست من قبل Riada Tech ، شركة تطوير برمجيات رائدة مقرها في المملكة الأردنية الهاشمية ، تم بناء سمعتنا على تقديم حلول تطوير تطبيقات عالية الجودة.

هدفنا الأساسي هو مساعدة الشركات من جميع الأحجام على الازدهار في العصر الرقمي من خلال تطوير تطبيقات مخصصة. سواء كنت شركة ناشئة صغيرة أو مؤسسة متوسطة الحجم أو شركة كبيرة ، فنحن هنا لنشاركك ودفع عجلة نموك.

ما يميزنا هو فريقنا المتخصص من مطوري التطبيقات المحترفين. بفضل خبرتهم وإبداعهم وكفاءتهم التقنية ، نقوم بتحويل الأفكار إلى حقيقة واقعة. من خلال الاستفادة من التقنيات المتطورة وأفضل الممارسات الصناعية ، نضمن أن تطبيقاتنا ليست جذابة بصريًا فحسب ، بل تقدم أيضًا تجارب مستخدم سلسة.

نحن نتفهم أن كل عمل له متطلبات وأهداف فريدة. لهذا السبب نتبع نهجًا شخصيًا لكل مشروع. نتعاون بشكل وثيق مع عملائنا ، ونكتسب فهمًا عميقًا لأهدافهم وتحدياتهم والجمهور المستهدف. يتيح لنا ذلك تطوير تطبيقات مخصصة تلبي احتياجاتهم الخاصة وتتوافق مع رؤيتهم طويلة المدى.

التزامنا لا ينتهي مع إطلاق التطبيق. نحن نؤمن ببناء شراكات طويلة الأمد مع عملائنا. نحن نقدم خدمات الدعم والصيانة المستمرة لضمان أن تظل التطبيقات محدثة وآمنة ومحسّنة لتحقيق أعلى أداء. هدفنا هو أن نكون شريكًا تقنيًا موثوقًا به يمكن للشركات الاعتماد عليه أثناء تنقلهم في المشهد الرقمي المتغير باستمرار.

سجلنا يتحدث عن نفسه. لقد نجحنا في تسليم المشاريع التي حولت الأعمال التجارية ، وعززت كفاءتها وإنتاجيتها ونجاحها بشكل عام. مع تفانينا الراسخ في الجودة وإرضاء العملاء ، اكتسبنا ثقة العديد من العملاء في جميع أنحاء العالم.

عندما تختارنا كشريك في تطوير التطبيق ، يمكنك أن تتوقع رحلة سلسة من الفكرة إلى التنفيذ. سنعمل معك عن كثب ، ونشركك في كل مرحلة من مراحل عملية التطوير ، ونضمن أن المنتج النهائي يلبي ويتجاوز توقعاتك.

انضم إلينا في هذه الرحلة التحويلية وافتح الإمكانات الكاملة لعملك من خلال حلولنا الشاملة لتطوير التطبيقات. معًا ، يمكننا إحداث فرق في السوق ودفع نجاحك في المجال الرقمي.

Description:
Com sede em Curitiba, a Phoenix Innovation Lab é uma consultoria especializada em inovação, pesquisa e desenvolvimento (P&D) para a concepção de produtos digitais, criação de ecossistemas de serviço para espaços físicos e transformação organizacional.

Nossa abordagem combina tecnologia, design, dados e estratégia para desenvolver soluções inovadoras que impulsionam negócios e melhoram a experiência dos usuários. Atuamos em três frentes principais:

● Pesquisa, Desenvolvimento e Inovação (P,D&I)
Exploramos tendências, validamos hipóteses e aplicamos novas tecnologias para criar soluções eficientes e competitivas. Além disso, realizamos análises da qualidade, experiência e jornada de produtos e serviços já existentes, identificando oportunidades de melhoria e inovação. Nossa abordagem baseada em design centrado no usuário, análise de dados e experimentação nos permite inovar de forma estruturada e orientada por insights reais.

● Produtos Digitais e Ecossistemas de Serviço para Espaços Físicos
Desenvolvemos softwares, aplicativos e marketplaces, além de projetar experiências conectadas para ambientes físicos, como lojas, restaurantes, eventos e espaços de atendimento. Criamos ecossistemas de serviço que integram processos, tecnologia e interações humanas, proporcionando jornadas fluidas e impactantes para clientes e colaboradores.

● Transformação Organizacional e Digital
Redesenhamos processos, modelos de negócios e operações para preparar empresas para o futuro. Atuamos na otimização da experiência do colaborador, na reestruturação de fluxos internos e na digitalização de serviços, garantindo eficiência e inovação sustentável.

Trabalhamos com projetos de pequeno a grande porte, sempre focados em excelência, inovação e impacto transformador.

Nosso propósito é claro: integrar inovação, pesquisa e sustentabilidade para criar soluções que impulsionam negócios, transformam realidades e elevam experiências.

Name: BuildForCare
Description:
La santé ne peut se passer du numérique, et bien qu'il existe des solutions pour les besoins primaires et de forte volumétrie, il est souvent complexe de satisfaire les besoins spécifiques.

 Notre ambition est d’apporter des solutions humaines, organisationnelles et informatiques personnalisées à destination du métier
𝗖’𝗲𝘀𝘁 𝗮̀ 𝗹𝗮 𝘀𝗼𝗹𝘂𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗻𝘂𝗺𝗲́𝗿𝗶𝗾𝘂𝗲 𝗱𝗲 𝘀’𝗮𝗱𝗮𝗽𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝗮𝘂 𝗯𝗲𝘀𝗼𝗶𝗻 𝗱𝘂 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗳𝗲𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗻𝗲𝗹 𝗲𝘁 𝗻𝗼𝗻 𝗹’𝗶𝗻𝘃𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗲

 Se basant sur l’utilisation de la technologie No-Code / Low-Code, notre approche repose sur 4 piliers :
- Permettre une personnalisation des solutions, en adaptant le numérique au métier et non l’inverse
- Apporter un soutien à l’utilisation via un support élargi des aspects techniques aux fonctionnalités métier
- Fournir des solutions à un coût abordable et maîtrisé
- Mettre à disposition des compétences requises au sein de la structure

 Nous sommes une équipe de passionnés
Depuis une dizaine d’années, nous œuvrons dans le domaine de la santé, en qualité de directeur adjoint, de développeur e-santé ou de consultant et sommes confrontés aux mêmes problématiques : l’absence de personnalisation du numérique, l’écart entre le besoin métier et la solution proposée, le prisme d’analyse centré sur le métier ou le digital, mais rarement les deux en même temps.
Partageant cette vision, ayant convenu que le No-Code pouvait répondre aux besoins du milieu de la santé, et souhaitant bâtir le futur, nous lançons BuildForCare le 1er juillet 2022.
Fort des compétences acquises, nous lions les approches processus, métier et informatique en un tout cohérent destiné à l’optimisation du fonctionnement des structures & professionnels de santé. Notre approche est centrée sur le métier, sur la compréhension de vos enjeux et de votre fonctionnement, afin de définir la cible idéale. Nous visons une collaboration sur la longue durée, afin de bien cerner vos besoins et de constamment y répondre.

I servizi OperaeGIS intercettano e soddisfano i principali bisogni relativi alla gestione delle strade da parte dei proprietari/gestori.
Assicurare la corretta manutenzione della segnaletica stradale per garantire la sicurezza degli utenti della strada.

Dall’esperienza ultra-trentennale nel settore, grazie all’analisi delle esigenze gestionali e la disponibilità di nuove tecnologie informatiche, è nata l’intuizione di produrre ricerca e innovazione digitale con tecnologia GIS nel segmento specifico del catasto e della progettazione del segnalamento stradale.Con il sistema di mappatura geografica con Software Gis abbiamo creato specifiche banche dati cartografiche, complete e agevolmente accessibili grazie alla digitalizzazione delle informazioni caratteristiche della segnaletica stradale (sostegni, tipologie di segnali stradali, ecc.)

Name: 3Dwins - Metaverse Creation for Companies in HQ
Description:
Welcome to 3Dwins site

Our company uses the Anata framework, sells 3D web domain addresses (gdtp:// internet protocol) and creates high-quality metaverses for small, medium and large companies. 

About Anata framework:

Anata is a novel metaverse platform to build and explore metaverse worlds. Anata is designed for average computers, to let anyone join the metaverse.
Anata is an hybrid browser, where you can browse websites and 3D worlds simultaneously. In the Anata browser you can open websites and dock them next to each other, for a more fluent workflow.

What 3Dwins can provide you:

1 Creation of a 3D website (own metaverse) –
In the first step, we assess the client's needs. What kind of metaverse do you want, who is your target audience, what kind of interactive content do you want to display (we also help you plan this).
You have the opportunity to implement games, programs, interactive marketing tools, 2D content, existing 2D websites, and present business processes. In your own metaverse, you can build a community that you can support with programs, lectures, presentations, games, etc. entertain them. You can sell advertising space and provide a gateway to the metaverse of other companies.  For this version, the client's metaverse is accessed through the Anata browser.

Price: from €800

2 White Label - With this option, the options mentioned in point 1 are also given. We generate your own download file (e.g. mycompany.exe) with your own logo. In this case as well, the users download the Anata browser, but the client does not need to advertise the Anata system, cause can advertise it as its own unique Metaverse for its target audience, like the ‘Mycompany’ metaverse. Here, in practice, users come directly to the client's website.

Price: from €2000

3 We manage your metaverse. We organize programs and events. We build your community using marketing tools. We practically fill your metaverse with breath. 

Price: from €500/month

For a long time, the company has embarked on a path leading to the combination of artistic expression and technological innovation: the European patent OLOS, the process for reproducing life-size interactive human beings, which is mainly applied in the fields of education and culture.

On the other hand, the collaboration with universities and research institutes has stimulated the research and development process that led to obtaining two other patents: HI - Human Interface, which simulates human presence in the real environment, and I-CINEMA, which aims to experimenting innovative solutions of interactive cinematography.

Name: tinyVision.ai Inc.
Description:
tinyVision.ai is a product engineering company specializing in sensor bridging, edge AI, and low-power embedded systems. 

We empower startups and fast-moving innovators by delivering complete solutions—from concept to production—for IoT, wearable, and computer vision applications.

Founded in 2018, tinyVision.ai combines decades of engineering experience with deep system-level expertise. 

tinyVision.ai specializes in developing advanced embedded vision, sensor bridging, and digital logic solutions that empower intelligent edge devices across diverse applications. Our expertise spans hardware design, embedded firmware, microcontroller and FPGA integration, and system-level solutions tailored for low-power, high-performance edge computing.

We provide modular hardware platforms and development kits—such as sensor interface bridges and open-source digital logic boards—that simplify integration of complex sensors and accelerate prototyping for embedded vision, AI, IoT, and industrial automation projects. Our solutions support multiple silicon technologies and open-source toolchains, enabling flexibility and innovation without vendor lock-in.

We’re active contributors to the tinyML and open hardware education communities, with a strong commitment to accelerating development timelines and reducing time-to-market.

What We Do:

- Sensor Bridging Solutions (MIPI to USB, camera integration)
- Custom System on Modules (SoMs)
- FPGA/RTL and Firmware Design
- Edge Vision & AI Processing
- Embedded Systems for Robotics, Automotive, Industrial & Wearables
- Educational Boards and Open Tools for Learning

Let’s build the future—at the edge.

Description:
GoDo Ecosystem is a catalyst for change and impact. From volunteering opportunities to corporate social responsibility, our solutions are all about making a meaningful impact, one action at a time.

GoDo will connect people with NGOs, Funders and Companies that do, and want to do good. 

With GoDo Personal people will be able to track the good work they do. Through the GoDo Tracker App people will be able to see a list of opportunities to do good and get invites to do good from their employer or non-profits around them.

Through the GoDo Non-Profit NGOs will be able to attract, invite, manage and reward volunteers. With the GoDo-data NGOs can assert themselves as the important pillar they are in society.

With GoDo Business companies that want to give back to society will be able to invite, inspire and follow up on their staff doing good together.
Our aim is to transform the data of the good doings in to your company ESG-reports.

With the GoDo Funders solution GoDo will be able to transform volunteer work to hard data, that can be budgeted, monitored and reported on. With this data your funding decision process will be made easier.

Want to do good? GoDo will make that happen!

Name: Code Against Cancer
Description:
Jesteśmy społecznością zaangażowaną w tworzenie użytecznych projektów informatyczno-naukowych z zakresu programowania, biotechnologii i wielu innych dziedzin, których efektem są dedykowane rozwiązania terapeutyczne dla pacjentów z chorobami nowotworowymi. 

Nasza społeczność łączy w swoich działaniach głębokie zrozumienie biologii z fachową wiedzą z zakresu bioinformatyki, uczenia maszynowego i inżynierii oprogramowania. Buduje również własne zbiory danych biologicznych, które w połączeniu z autorskimi technologiami sztucznej inteligencji pozwalają wspierać procesy tworzenia nowych, skutecznych terapii. 

Obok pracy z misją pomagania ludziom, której dedykujemy nasze talenty,  pomagamy też bezpośrednio. 
Szczególnie dzieciom dotkniętym przez nowotwory, ale także prowadzimy akcje i projekty edukacyjne w zakresie profilaktyki chorób nowotworowych.

Pomysł na stworzenie społeczności Code Against Cancer która będzie wymieniać się fachową wiedzą, doświadczeniami, prezentować ciekawe rozwiązania i inspirować się wzajemnie powstał 4 lata temu w zespole programistów i naukowców związanych z Ardigen.
Chcemy wyjść dalej - uczyć się i inspirować się wzajemnie do pracy na rzecz ważnych ludzkich wartości  i uważności na drugiego człowieka.
Wierzymy, że to ma głęboki sens. 
Wiemy, że podarowanie swoich talentów pracy z misją nadaje jej znacznie większy sens, a nam satysfakcję i motywację.
Dla nas w centrum uwagi jest człowiek, który potrzebuje pomocy w walce z chorobą. Nasze rozwiązania mają mu służyć i zatrzymać tsunami zachorowań na raka.
Pomagamy też tu i teraz wraz z Fundacją Zostaw Swój Ślad, wspierając terapie i spełniając marzenia dzieci chorych na nowotwory.
Prowadzimy akcje edukacyjne w zakresie profilaktyki przeciwnowotworowej. Wydajemy książki i poradniki, webinary.
Zapraszamy wszystkich, którzy chcą uczyć się i rozwijać ale też dzielić swoją wiedzą na temat nowoczesnych metod tworzenia terapii. 
I chcą swoje talenty rozwijać z misją :)

Name: Data Experts Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Data Experts is a dynamic team of people with over 15 years of hands-on experience in the IT market, serving a wide range of customers from both Poland and other European countries.

Our company is a direct certified and authorized VAD/VAP type of sales partner of many leading IT manufacturers (like xFusion, H3C, Huawei, Inspur), and provides authorized service (including 4H on site) coverage for the environments built based on these manufacturers' hardware.

Our main areas of activities are:

- hardware: servers; storage (disk arrays); NAS; network switches; access points; WiFi routers,

- software solutions: virtualization; HCI hyperconvergence; SDS; data protection (Backup and Data Recovery); SAP HANA; parallel file systems; Object Storage; optimization of artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning (ML) and deep learning (DL) frameworks; Edge analytics for Industry 4.0,

- Pre-deployment services and on-site implementations: analysis and design of IT environments, physical hardware installation and configuration; system and services migration; optimization of environment administration; implementation of full-stack HPC and AI clusters; implementation of A/A active-active clusters; installation and configuration of SAP ERP (SoH/S4H) and data warehouse (BW4H); creation of Active Directory environments; network configurations from physical connections to layers #2 and #3; network microsegmentation; implementation of network access policies (from 802. 1x to ACLs); WiFi network design (roaming, mesh),

- Service and after-sales support: hotline for service requests with guaranteed response time; on-site service with guaranteed fix time of effective failure removal; periodic reviews and updates of environments; system audits.

Our sales office is located in Warsaw, on the 38th floor of the well-known Warsaw Spire building (Plac Europejski 1).

Name: ConveuX
Description:
In today's rapidly evolving digital landscape, businesses face the challenge of standing out and creating memorable experiences for their users. At Conveux, we understand the critical role that user experience (UX) plays in driving customer satisfaction, engagement, and business success. As a leading UX consulting firm, we are passionate about helping businesses unlock the true potential of their digital presence through exceptional user experiences. Led by industry expert Manan Vaidya, Conveux brings together a team of talented professionals who are dedicated to delivering innovative and impactful UX solutions.

Understanding the Essence of UX Consulting:

UX consulting is a multidisciplinary field that focuses on creating user-centered designs and interfaces. It involves understanding user behavior, conducting research, and applying design principles to craft seamless and intuitive experiences. At Conveux, we believe that UX is not just about aesthetics or functionality; it is about creating meaningful interactions that resonate with users on an emotional level. By placing users at the center of our design process, we aim to create experiences that are not only visually appealing but also meet the needs and expectations of our clients' target audience.

The Conveux Approach:

Conveux takes a holistic and client-centric approach to UX consulting. We believe that every business is unique and requires a tailored approach to address its specific goals and challenges. Our process begins with in-depth research and analysis, where we seek to understand our clients' target audience, business objectives, and competitive landscape. By gaining a comprehensive understanding of the context in which our clients operate, we are able to develop UX strategies that are aligned with their vision and objectives.

Especializada no mercado Business-to-Business (B2B) de TI, a PRESENTA - soluções tecnológicas customizadas, tem em seus clientes o seu maior patrimônio, reflexo de muita experiência e do atendimento personalizado. 
Seu foco está direcionando a uma carteira sólida e diversificada de clientes, do segmento de serviços que inclui Bancos (comerciais e de:  investimentos, montadoras, varejo, nacionais e internacionais, públicos e privados). Além, de: Cooperativas, Distribuidoras, Corretoras, Fundos garantidores de crédito, Gestoras de cartão de crédito e Administradora de consórcio.  
Por meio de uma abordagem acolhedora, a empresa busca constantemente otimizar as operações de seus parceiros, oferecendo soluções adaptadas às necessidades do mercado e de seus clientes.
Ao longo de sua trajetória de quase 25 anos, a PRESENTA – soluções tecnológicas customizadas, tem se mantido atuante e comprometida com a excelência em serviços, acompanhando as evoluções do mercado e se adaptando às mudanças do setor. Com uma equipe qualificada e apaixonada por tecnologia, a empresa está preparada para enfrentar os desafios mais complexos do cenário atual. 
A PRESENTA – soluções tecnológicas customizadas, orgulha-se de sua história, construída sobre os pilares de um atendimento humanizado, inovador e parceira dos seus clientes. 
Em constante evolução, a PRESENTA, visa continuar sendo referência no desenvolvimento de soluções tecnológicas customizadas, que impulsionam o sucesso de seus clientes no dinâmico mundo da tecnologia da informação

Name: moveable
Description:
Our goal is a more sustainable infrastructure and we develop and operate digital participation platforms to improve the infrastructure for active mobility.

Bikeable is a tool for users and authorities of cycling infrastructure to make riding a bike more attractive and safer.

This is how it works: a user takes a foto of a place to be improved or a good example and uploads the spot with his title and comment. The spot is then displayed on the map and shown in the list. Other users can put emphasis on different spots with their votes and can participate in finding solutions in the discussion. Cities, engineering companies and political interest groups as well as journalists can stay up to date about the problems and preferences of the local bike community. Small problems should be able to be quickly fixed and for the larger problems, the site serves as a digital memory so when major interventions have to be made, nothing is forgotten.

Name: Modatta
Description:
Conecte-se ao seu consumidor através de jornadas personalizadas, gamificação e performance em todos os canais estratégicos para a sua marca.

Somos a Modatta, uma startup de dados que nasceu em Portugal por conta da Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados. Acreditamos que haveria uma grande mudança no mercado e que se materializaria no marketing digital. Por isso, criamos um app que hoje funciona 100% no Brasil e possui uma comunidade de quase 2MM de usuários únicos e validados na Receita Federal - aqui não tem robô ou usuário repetido! Através dele, conectamos marcas e usuários através de uma experiência profunda, divertida e justa:
  # Profunda: Coletamos mais de 90 datapoints dos usuários. Desde informações simples como renda, gênero, escolaridade, onde mora, até mais completas, como se tem filhos ou ainda se prefere beber vinho ou cerveja. As marcas também podem criar seus próprios datapoints, fazendo com que as possibilidades de segmentação sejam infinitas.
    # Divertidas: Toda campanha de marketing tem o formato de missão. Assim como um jogo, as missões tem um objetivo - o target do seu negócio. 
    # Justo: Quando o usuário cumpre com sucesso o objetivo da missão, ele ganha uma recompensa financeira por estar dedicando o tempo dele (e o dados) para a sua marca.

Como conseguimos te ajudar?
- Redes Sociais: Aumento de Seguidores, Aumento de Engajamento, Criação de Conteúdo por parte do usuário

Name: Visual Contracts
Description:
Clients who connect with Visual Contracts share our responsible design philosophy while facing challenges delivering high-quality contract design that's both implementable and manageable. We tackle this by building generative AI solutions that scale contract design for HR and legal teams. Rather than focusing solely on automation, we bring the human aspect to contracting.

Over the last 2 years, Visual Contracts earned recognition including: Hague subsidy for innovation collaborations with LISI/We Are Stewards/TU Delft/Erasmus Law, CSU Innovators 2023 finalist, Access to Justice Award winner (Pels Rijcken 2023), TLTF Summit Miami startup pitcher 2023, Dutch Legal Design Lab launch 2024 (including mock trial proving our contracts hold up in court!), and Slaughter & May Legal Tech Accelerator GenAI participant 2024. We were selected for the finals among the 2% in a renowned accelerator and among the last 5% in the finals for a major grant. 

If you're an HR professional in blue collar sectors, inhouse counsel, impact startup/scaleup, or lawyer believing in human-centered innovation and accessible legal solutions, check out our free 'Get Started' offer: Contract Design Brief plus 7 days free training: https://visualcontracts.com/get-started/

Description:

Nestes 6 anos foram formados profissionais para atuação na área de Data Science como engenheiro de dados, arquiteto de dados, cientistas de dados, analistas de dados, visualização de dados, desenvolvedor Python, desenvolvedor R, desenvolvedores de AI/ML, desenvolvedores AI/DL, criação LLMs (AI Generativa).

O IDVLabs é focado no desenvolvimento profissional e na inclusão no mercado de trabalho, especialmente para o primeiro emprego e posições executivas. Eles oferecem formação assistida por profissionais sêniores e executivos em sabático.

Transformamos vidas e impactamos negócios, com o nosso foco social e de aprendizado. Nossa área de serviços conecta jovens talentos em busca de experiência prática que fizeram as formações do IDVLabs com profissionais experientes, em um ciclo virtuoso de aprendizado e desenvolvimento.

Através dos projetos em nossos clientes, os alunos adquirem habilidades valiosas para o mercado de trabalho, enquanto executivos em transição de carreira ou aposentados encontram um novo propósito e compartilham seus conhecimentos. Juntos, construímos um futuro mais promissor para todos.

Name: Socium Scale Systems
Description:
Sua empresa está pronta para escalar, mas a estrutura de dados ainda é um desafio? 

Entendemos que, no dinamismo do dia a dia empresarial, muitos líderes excelentes acabam enfrentando perdas contundentes de tempo e recursos devido a ineficiências na estrutura e gestão de dados. Muitas vezes acabam gastando um fortuna para contratar cada vez mais gente para cobrir essas ineficiências, se colocando em situação que bloqueia seu crescimento.

Nós, da Socium, estamos aqui para mudar esse cenário e garantir que o seu crescimento seja sólido e sustentável, criando a estrutura profissional e definitiva que você precisa para extrair o máximo valor de IA e computação em nuvem.
Você sente que dá pra automatizar, mas tá complicado? A Socium descomplica.

Com isso você terá altas doses de:
 Redução de Custos: Automatize processos e minimize despesas operacionais
 Aumento de Receita: Agilidade e qualidade no atendimento ao cliente através de sistemas preditivos e personalização avançada.
 Gestão Assertiva: Decisões com KPIs precisos e análises de dados por IA. 

Como?
Sem parar nada na sua operação, mapeamos tudo, organizamos seus dados, automatizamos processos e desenvolvemos ferramentas sob medida. Tudo isso com uma infraestrutura de nuvem moderna e segura. Resultado? Decisões mais rápidas, equipe mais produtiva, muito mais controle sobre o negócio e muito mais.

A Socium é a parceira ideal para startups ou empresas tradicionais que:

=> Lidam com excesso de processos manuais.
=> Sofrem com dados desorganizados.
=> Buscam escalabilidade com eficiência.

 Quer ver como isso funcionaria na sua empresa? Envie uma mensagem direta para agendar seu DIAGNÓSTICO GRATUITO e descubra como podemos levar sua empresa para o próximo nível.

Description:

As brands move beyond campaigns and impressions, we focus on designing system-led participation that drives repeat behaviour across mobile-first touchpoints + gamification layering.

Our work spans strategy, design, and engineering, with a strong emphasis on building proprietary platforms that sit on top of existing ecosystems rather than replacing them.

Managed Services Provider(MSP): 
Managed Services (MSP) is a strategic approach that allows organizations to effectively manage their contingent workforce. At HRP global We take responsibility of managing specific functions and services related to contingent workforce. The Contingent workers can include "Independent Contractors", "Full time Consultants" and "Temporary Staff". RPO Services: 
RPO stands for Recruitment Process Outsourcing. It’s a strategic partnership where organizations entrust their recruitment processes to an external provider. At HRP Global we take on all or part of a client’s hiring process. They act as an extension of the company’s recruitment department, offering dedicated recruiting capacity, advanced technology, and expertise. HRP Global RPO offers several advantages, including Analytic-driven decision-making, long-term talent pipe-lining, and scalability.

With SENSOMATT AI Solutions, we’re driving change to make technology a true companion in the journey to a better, more inclusive world.

Name: Big Data Analyticss
Description:
Big Data Analytics refers to the process of examining and analyzing large and complex datasets—often referred to as "big data"—to uncover patterns, correlations, trends, and insights that can drive decision-making, optimize operations, and create new opportunities. With the increasing volume, variety, and velocity of data being generated in today's digital age, traditional data processing tools are often insufficient. Big data analytics uses advanced technologies and methodologies such as machine learning, artificial intelligence, and data mining to handle, process, and extract meaningful information from vast datasets.

Key components of Big Data Analytics include:

Data Collection and Integration: Gathering data from a variety of sources like sensors, social media, business transactions, and IoT devices. This data can be structured, unstructured, or semi-structured.

Data Storage and Management: Storing massive amounts of data in scalable and distributed systems like Hadoop, NoSQL databases, or cloud-based data warehouses, ensuring the data is easily accessible for analysis.

Data Processing: Utilizing technologies like Apache Hadoop, Spark, or other distributed computing frameworks to process large datasets efficiently, often in real-time or batch processing.

Data Analysis and Visualization: Applying statistical, machine learning, or AI algorithms to the data to identify trends and patterns. The results are often visualized through dashboards, charts, and reports to aid in decision-making.

Insights and Decision-Making: Leveraging the insights obtained through data analysis to guide business strategies, improve operational efficiency, enhance customer experiences, or predict future trends.

Applications of Big Data Analytics:

Healthcare: Predicting patient outcomes, personalizing treatments, and improving operational efficiency.
Retail: Understanding consumer behavior, optimizing supply chains, and personalizing marketing efforts.
Finance: Detecting fraudulent

Name: Website Development Houston Texas Newyork
Description:
Website development services Houston Texas Newyork refer to the professional services provided to design, create, develop, and maintain websites for individuals, businesses, organizations, or other entities. These services encompass a wide range of activities, from planning and designing the website's layout and visual elements to coding and programming its functionality. Here are some common aspects of website development services:

    Web Design: This involves creating the visual appearance and user interface (UI) of the website. Designers focus on layout, color schemes, typography, and overall aesthetics to ensure the site is visually appealing and user-friendly.

    Front-End Development: Front-end developers work on the client-side of the website, implementing the design using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. They ensure that the website is responsive and functions properly on various devices and browsers.

    Back-End Development: Back-end developers handle the server-side of the website. They build the database, server, and application logic that allows the website to function, process user data, and provide dynamic content.

    Content Management System (CMS) Integration: Some websites require CMS platforms like WordPress, Drupal, or Joomla for easy content updates. Website developers integrate and customize these CMS systems to meet the client's needs.

    E-commerce Development: For online stores, e-commerce development services focus on creating a secure, user-friendly platform for selling products or services online. This may involve payment gateway integration, product catalog setup, and shopping cart development.

    Database Development: Database developers design and implement the database architecture that stores and retrieves data for the website. They ensure data integrity, security, and efficient data management.

Name: Invisible Cities Srl
Description:
Invisible Cities è una startup italiana all'avanguardia nel campo della realtà virtuale (VR) su larga scala, con un forte focus sulla valorizzazione del patrimonio culturale e la sostenibilità. Fondata con l’obiettivo di rivoluzionare l’esperienza del viaggio e dell’apprendimento, la nostra azienda integra le più avanzate tecnologie di VR con la mobilità, creando soluzioni che trasformano ogni spostamento in un'esperienza immersiva e educativa.

Il nostro prodotto di punta, Mov-X, è un sistema innovativo che sincronizza in tempo reale i movimenti di veicoli reali con ambienti virtuali 3D, permettendo agli utenti di esplorare ricostruzioni storiche e scenari virtuali in maniera completamente immersiva. Utilizziamo monitor OLED trasparenti di LG e visori VR tradizionali per offrire un’esperienza visiva senza precedenti, che può essere personalizzata e adattata a diverse esigenze.

Mov-X è progettato per essere utilizzato su veicoli full electric o ibridi, dimostrando il nostro impegno verso la sostenibilità e la riduzione dell’impatto ambientale. Grazie alla nostra piattaforma web, interamente sviluppata internamente, è possibile gestire e personalizzare ogni aspetto dell’esperienza da remoto, rendendo il nostro sistema estremamente flessibile e scalabile.

Invisible Cities non si limita al solo turismo; le nostre soluzioni trovano applicazione anche nell’edutainment, nella formazione professionale e nel settore immobiliare, con tour virtuali personalizzati e integrati con l’intelligenza artificiale per offrire esperienze sempre più coinvolgenti e su misura.

Il nostro obiettivo è diventare un punto di riferimento globale nella rivoluzione delle esperienze virtuali, portando la cultura e l’innovazione tecnologica al centro della mobilità futura. Invisible Cities è la scelta ideale per chi cerca di investire in un futuro dove la tecnologia e la cultura si fondono per creare nuove possibilità di esplorazione e apprendimento.

Name: DeliveRx
Description:
DeliveRx is a pioneering digital health intelligence platform, designed to enhance research, strategy, and implementation in global public health. Positioned at the intersection of AI-driven insights and real-world healthcare challenges, we empower researchers, strategists, and specialists with precision-driven solutions to accelerate impact.

Founded by a global health leader with over two decades of experience in global public health communications, regulatory policy, and digital medical education innovation, DeliverRx was created to bridge critical gaps in knowledge and strategy. With a background spanning multilateral organisations, government agencies, and the private sector, our founder has advised WHO initiatives, shaped global health policies, and led transformative campaigns across Asia, Africa, and the Middle East.

We take a nimble yet rigorous approach, integrating data, AI, and human expertise to provide real-time, culturally relevant, and actionable insights. Our collaborations with organisations such as WHO, PMNCH, and A*STAR reflect our commitment to responsible AI and scalable health solutions.

At DeliverRx, we don’t just interpret data—we translate it into impact. From strengthening maternal and child health interventions to advancing public health communications and funding strategies, we ensure every insight serves a greater purpose: improving lives, accelerating solutions, and driving global health equity.

Name: Deep3D - Ingeniería, Diseño, Arquitectura y Construcción
Description:
Deep3D: 20 Años de Innovación y Tecnología al Servicio de la Ingeniería

Deep3D es una empresa de ingeniería, proyectos e innovación con más de 20 años de experiencia en Chile y el extranjero. Nuestra historia comenzó en los años 90 con proyectos en 2D usando Autocad. Con el paso del tiempo, adoptamos el 3D y nos especializamos en animación y renderizado con 3D Studio Max, elevando significativamente la calidad visual de nuestros trabajos.

Durante el auge inmobiliario de los 2000, participamos en más de 400 proyectos para empresas como Sencorp, Brotec, Echeverría Izquierdo e Inmobiliaria La Cruz, consolidándonos como referentes en visualización arquitectónica. Con el tiempo, hemos integrado tecnologías como realidad aumentada (AR) y virtual (VR), ofreciendo herramientas inmersivas para potenciar la promoción de proyectos.

Nos especializamos también en levantamientos complejos mediante tecnologías como escáneres láser, drones, batimetría y escáneres métricos. Aplicamos metodologías BIM desde mediados de los 2000, lo que nos permite modelar, coordinar y optimizar proyectos públicos y privados, reduciendo errores y mejorando la colaboración.

Hoy avanzamos hacia los gemelos digitales, integrando sensores y datos en tiempo real para representar lo que ocurre en terreno. Esto permite generar alertas, planificar mantenimientos y tomar decisiones basadas en inteligencia artificial, potenciando la eficiencia operativa y predictiva.

En Deep3D, si la solución no existe, la creamos. Contamos con un equipo multidisciplinario apasionado por la tecnología, la ingeniería y la innovación, comprometido con transformar ideas en realidades seguras y eficientes.

Electronic design automation
There are numerous tools for developing electronics. For PCBA, FPGA, Chip, Cabling, there are multiple vendors with multiple tools. The choice of tools is one but connecting those tools together with the rest of the company’s systems is another thing. Tools have to be configured, libraries have to be developed and filled, interfaces have to be made. But also, the way of working, procedures and data management is important. Dizain-Sync can help you to do the steps from tool selection to implementation and support the design flow.

Nous concevons, calibrons et éprouvons des systèmes de croissance qui accélèrent, sécurisent et valorisent les entreprises.

De objecten denk hierbij aan: auto's, vrachtauto's, trailers, werkmaterieel, graafmachines, pompen, enzovoorts kunnen overal ter wereld op afstand beheert, gevolgd, bewaakt en aangestuurd worden.

Name: Digital Development
Description:
W Digital Development jesteśmy technologicznym wsparciem dla firm, dostosowując rozwiązania do ich celów i zasobów. W zależności od sytuacji czasem konieczne jest stworzenie dedykowanej aplikacji, innym razem wdrożenie automatyzacji usprawniającej procesy. Niekiedy kluczowe staje się połączenie istniejących systemów, ich optymalizacja lub poprawne wdrożenie infrastruktury, by działała efektywnie. Analizujemy specyfikę działalności, by wdrażać rozwiązania, które realnie usprawnią codzienną pracę i pozwolą uniknąć zbędnych kosztów, zapewniając stabilność działania.

Dla pełnego wsparcia zajmujemy się projektowaniem, wdrażaniem oraz integracją systemów informatycznych, dbając o ich efektywność i niezawodność. Działamy krok po kroku, aby wdrożenia przebiegały płynnie, bez nagłych zmian i bez nadwyrężania budżetu. Skupiamy się na eliminacji nieproduktywnych zadań i optymalizacji procesów, co pozwala na lepsze wykorzystanie zasobów i stabilny rozwój firmy. Oferujemy również doradztwo technologiczne, pomagając dobrać narzędzia najlepiej dopasowane do specyfiki działalności i przyszłych potrzeb.

Wil je jouw bedrijf slimmer en efficiënter maken met IT en AI, maar weet je niet waar te beginnen?

Wil je je IT-capaciteit vergroten met jong talent zonder langdurige wervingstrajecten?

IT Student Lab maakt je organisatie toekomstbestendig!

 Snel inzicht in hoe IT en AI jouw bedrijf versterken
 Van concept naar realiteit met een werkbaar prototype en advies voor implementatie
 Mogelijkheid om talent te binden aan jouw organisatie

Hoe werkt het?

Stap 1: Ontdek de mogelijkheden van digitale transformatie
Samen kijken we naar hoe IT en AI jouw bedrijf kunnen versterken. In een vrijblijvende brainstormsessie brengen we kansen en uitdagingen in kaart, zodat je een helder beeld krijgt van de mogelijkheden.


Stap 2: Proof of Value & implementatie
Onze multidisciplinaire teams werken aan innovatieve oplossingen die direct impact maken. Met de nieuwste technologieën ontwikkelen zij praktische en schaalbare concepten die aansluiten bij jouw bedrijfsbehoeften.


Stap 3: Van outsourcing naar loondienst – talent binden aan jouw bedrijf
Tijdens het project leren studenten jouw organisatie kennen. Zie je potentieel? Dan kun je hen na afloop in dienst nemen. Zo bouw je aan een toekomstbestendig IT-team met jong talent dat jouw bedrijf van binnenuit kent.

Of het nu gaat om AI, business intelligence, cybersecurity of automatisering wij helpen je groeien met slimme oplossingen.

Welke dromen zou jij graag verwezenlijkt zien?

Description:
Chris Badura — UXUI Expert, Coach, Founder AkademiaUXUI, CEO, redaktor naczelny Product design Magazine, autor podręcznika i ćwiczeń UXUI Design Zoptymalizowany. Od ponad 25 lat zajmuję się Designem. Początkowo pracowałem jako Art Designer w Krakowskim Studiu Filmów Animowanych, następnie jako Concept Visual Designer w agencjach reklamowych, gdzie po kilku latach pełniłem rolę Art Directora. Następnie uruchomiłem własną agencję reklamową. Odnosiłem wówczas wymierne sukcesy, pracując bezpośrednio dla najbardziej rozpoznawalnych brandów. Od zawsze starałem się zrozumieć odbiorców dlatego chęć projektowania najlepszych rozwiązań dla użytkownika zdominowała całkowicie moją pracę.

Aktualnie, pracę jako konsultant UXUI dla międzynarodowych korporacji zdominowała całkowicie moją miłość do szerzenia edukacji. W oparciu o moje wieloletnie doświadczenie, rozwijam AkademięUXUI realizującą autorski kurs Full Stack UXUI Designer. Zawarta tam podstawa programowa została skrojona tak, aby przez praktyczne doświadczanie wiedzy, możliwe było efektywne zaistnienie w zawodzie jako UXUI Designer.

Description:
Skyrocket is a specialist Shopify & Webflow studio based in Aotearoa, built around one idea: a website should be the most reliable asset of your business, not the thing holding everything up.

We work with brands that have outgrown “good enough” and need a digital system that actually plugs into how their business runs. Every project is led and delivered by experienced specialists, not filtered through layers of account managers or junior teams.

Most of our partnerships begin when the digital setup has become messy, fragile or disconnected. Analytics that don’t make sense. Marketing tools that don’t talk to the website. Teams nervous to update a page. 

We step in to untangle the architecture and rebuild it into something clear, stable and commercially sound.

We approach the web as an ecosystem, not a series of pages. That means performance that supports revenue, and a structure your team can actually manage day to day. The result is a website that works behind the scenes and gives you confidence in the numbers.

Skyrocket exists for brands that want long-term thinking, technical clarity and systems built to last, not reinvention every twelve months.

Name: Audiri Health
Description:
We help time-pressed clinicians deliver holistic pain care without extra workload.

In 2020, our co-founder Idalien’s life changed overnight. After a car accident, she went from an active, social life to being bedbound for years and lost in a maze of treatments and ten-minute consultations where her story never truly landed.

Her recovery began not when her pain disappeared, but when she stopped fighting it and learned to listen, track, and understand what her body was telling her.

That’s why we built Audiri: to help bring that awareness into daily life. Patients get step-by-step guidance: short lessons to understand pain, practical pacing and mind-body exercises, and simple check-ins to track what helps. Care professionals see progress at a glance, so their consult time  focuses on decisions and goals instead of repetition.

The result is that patients feel supported every day, and professionals regain time and focus to move care meaningfully forward. Co-created by patients, clinicians, and researchers, Audiri is designed for real-world impact.

Description:

Ces agents automatisent les tâches longues, répétitives ou complexes et s’adaptent aux besoins réels de chaque activité.

Pensés pour s’intégrer naturellement aux processus existants, ils exploitent les données disponibles et produisent des résultats mesurables dès leur mise en service.

Clé en main : un agent prêt à l’emploi, immédiatement opérationnel.

Sur mesure avec code source livré : liberté totale pour faire évoluer l’agent à tout moment.

La formation des équipes s’appuie sur un palier d’autonomie agentique : comprendre le fonctionnement d’un agent IA, savoir l’utiliser efficacement, puis apprendre à en concevoir ou à en faire évoluer de nouveaux en interne.

L’approche efficacité raisonnée consiste à concevoir des agents qui délivrent un maximum de valeur, tout en optimisant les ressources.

Notre expertise:
L’analyse des besoins et la conception de l’agent adapté.
Le déploiement d’agents IA prêts à fonctionner.
L’intégration directe dans les systèmes ou plateformes déjà utilisés.
La mise en place d’un parcours personnalisé de formation et d’autonomie, pour permettre aux équipes de comprendre, maîtriser et faire évoluer leurs agents IA.

Promptum transforme l’IA en allié concret, rentable et maîtrisable grâce à ses agents intelligents.

Name: ITEasy Sp. z o.o.
Description:
We are a dynamic company specializing in IT, providing innovative solutions for various industries. Our knowledge and experience allow us to effectively support our clients in achieving their business goals.

What do we specialize in?

1. Property Management
We offer a comprehensive property management system that groups buildings and units and includes tenant listings. Our solution enables handling resolutions, surveys, notifications, and unit billing. Additionally, the system provides rotational lockers for package deliveries from couriers. Residents can control the electric vehicle charging process via smartphone, with insight into their own usage.

Additional system features include opening gates and intercoms via smartphone or Android Auto/CarPlay. Our interactive administrative boards enable remote presentation of administrative content. The boards are equipped with motion sensors that turn off the screen when no one is nearby. The system also allows reading water and electricity consumption, providing a view of administrative and residential utility usage, and access to alerts.

2. Dedicated Systems for Industry and Logistics
We develop dedicated systems for industry, logistics, and transportation, offering support and development. From small internal applications to large systems and integration with external providers.

We have been operating in the IT market for many years, delivering innovative and effective solutions to our clients. We are ready to help you achieve success in today's digital world. Contact us to learn more about our services and how we can support your business.

Noi di Estia Solutions stiamo rivoluzionando l’esperienza della casa intelligente con AURA, il primo assistente domestico basato su intelligenza artificiale che supporta gli utenti in ogni aspetto della loro vita quotidiana.  

Cos'è AURA?
AURA è un ecosistema AI all-in-one che integra tre funzionalità chiave:  
-  AURA Energy – Monitora i consumi energetici e riduce i costi grazie a suggerimenti intelligenti.  
-  AURA Nutrition – Automatizza la pianificazione dei pasti, le liste della spesa e il controllo delle scadenze, riducendo lo spreco alimentare.  
-  AURA Time – Ottimizza la produttività con gestione intelligente delle attività e promemoria smart.  

La nostra missione
Il nostro obiettivo è portare intelligenza, efficienza e armonia in ogni casa, proprio come Estia, la dea greca del focolare. Grazie all’intelligenza artificiale e all’IoT, creiamo un’esperienza domestica fluida e intuitiva, in cui la tecnologia lavora davvero al servizio delle persone.

Name: Socilogue
Description:
O Socilogue é uma plataforma web que tem como seu objetivo salvar vidas; através da captação, registro e manutenção de doadores de sangue.

Hoje a plataforma é utilizada pelo Hemocentro Regional de Pelotas, que atende a região Sul e Campanha do estado do Rio Grande do Sul.

No Socilogue, o serviço de hemoterapia pode pedir sangue aos doadores, realizar campanhas, receber avaliações do seu serviço, enviar feedbacks aos doadores relacionados as avaliações, compartilhar fotos, atualizar o estoque de sangue, dentre outras funcionalidades. 

Além do serviço de hemoterapia, os doadores e receptores de sangue também podem solicitar sangue, compartilhar fotos e visualizar informações do hemocentro, tais como: estoque de sangue, localização e fotos do serviço de hemoterapia.

Nosso portfólio contempla desde estações totais, receptores GNSS e controladoras, até tecnologias avançadas de escaneamento 3D, como laser scanners, LiDAR e nuvem de pontos, além de softwares profissionais para coleta, pós-processamento e modelagem.

Somos representantes de marcas líderes como Geomate, GeoMax, Pix4D e Leica, garantindo equipamentos confiáveis, suporte técnico próximo e treinamentos gratuitos para nossos clientes.

Name: Blue Cromos AB
Description:
Blue Cromos - Making it easy to authenticate products, and to keep track of their data and movements - from factory, via distributors, to consumers, to recycling. Easy, secure and efficiently.

In a world full of fakes, being able to easily tell fakes from authentic products becomes increasingly important.

As a brand owner, you want to make sure that your investments in design, development and marketing aren’t eroded by counterfeiters selling substandard quality pretending to be yours. OR that service staff isn’t called out to fix problems caused by counterfeit spare parts, still reflecting poorly on your brand and company, though.

As a CEO, you want to be able to confidently tell investors that you’re on top of the issue of counterfeiters, protecting their investments.

Blue Cromos doesn’t stop at protecting companies, brands and consumers through easy authentication. That same ease of identification and authentication helps logistics systems run smoother, be more reliable and collect even more useful information to optimise operations. And, by extension, to keep track of products from cradle to recycling.

And we make it EASY!
- Nothing added to the product or the packaging
- No interference with manufacturing processes, neither for installation, nor in production
- Easy to authenticate, using a smartphone or tablet  – hand-held in light sufficient for a standard portrait image
- And – with a straightforward, efficient business model

Blue Cromos’ patented technology and 20 years of experience from the manufacturing industry enables us to help companies protect their brand, maintain trust with customers, keep consumers and the public safe from substandard products and gain supply chain insight and the transparency increasingly demanded by authorities and the public.

Name: Picept
Description:
AI agents are no longer just demos - they're live in production, handling real business operations, making autonomous decisions, and interacting with other agents across the internet.

Soon, the majority of transactions will be agent-to-agent. Your procurement agent negotiating with a supplier's sales agent. Your finance agent coordinating with banking APIs. Your customer service agent collaborating with logistics systems.

But here's the problem: Current infrastructure was built for humans, not autonomous agents operating at machine speed.

Picept transforms risky AI agent deployments into reliable, self-improving assets. From isolated tools to intelligent infrastructure. From risky experiments to reliable production systems.

We're not just securing AI - we're enabling the agent revolution. The backbone that powers the new economy where agents run business.

The agent economy is coming. We're building the rails.

Name: DriveSmart
Description:
DriveSmart was established over 30 years ago to provide the motor industry and its customers with vehicle evaluation, analysis, finance and tax tools.
 
During this time we've advised clients on topics ranging from finance product development to sophisticated tax strategies to optimise fleet operating costs.
 
We make complex topics such as vehicle selection, finance and taxation simpler for the industry and its customers.
 
We do this with our award-winning technology for examining vehicle running costs, specifications and equipment, together with detailed examination of finance alternatives, taxation and cash-flows.
 
Our aim is to make every vehicle purchase decision easier, whether it's from comparing cars or vans with competitors or analysing the most cost effective acquisition methods for individual cars or an entire fleet.
 
Our unique suite of online tools covers vehicle finance, equipment, specifications, emissions, company car taxation, fuel alternatives, salary sacrifice and more.
 
We've advised some of the world's pre-eminent car manufacturers and leasing companies, plus many large fleet operators and individual car and van buyers.
 
Our calculators and decision tools can be used online by buyers as well as manufacturers, lenders and brokers and we also create bespoke in-house calculators and tools to meet the requirements of our clients.

Name: Amazon SAR
Description:
A Amazon SAR apoia o desenvolvimento e a adoção de soluções verdes por meio de tecnologias avançadas de sensoriamento remoto, Interferometria SAR (InSAR) e análise de dados de satélite. Nossa plataforma oferece monitoramento contínuo e de alta resolução para mudanças ambientais como desmatamento, degradação do solo, sequestro de carbono e qualidade da água. Além disso, integramos IA para gerar relatórios automatizados e fornecer insights detalhados em tempo real.

Com essas ferramentas, capacitamos empresas, governos e ONGs a tomarem decisões baseadas em dados, adotando práticas sustentáveis e proativas para proteger os ecossistemas, particularmente na Amazônia. A Amazon SAR também oferece suporte a pequenos agricultores, incentivando a conservação de áreas florestais e o manejo sustentável. Nossa tecnologia auxilia na detecção precoce de riscos ambientais, garantindo que medidas corretivas sejam aplicadas de forma eficiente.

Ao fornecer dados precisos e acessíveis, promovemos uma economia regenerativa e ajudamos a mitigar os impactos das mudanças climáticas, oferecendo soluções tangíveis para a preservação da floresta e de recursos naturais. Nosso compromisso é ser uma força motriz na transição para um futuro mais verde e sustentável, com a floresta em pé.

Name: Wallterre
Description:
Bienvenue sur la page de Wallterre, un "Mechanical farmhand" au service du maraicher ! 
Wallterre est un assistant maraîcher mécanique conçu pour soutenir les maraîchers dans leur travail quotidien.
Historique : 
A l'Helmo, Marie Sabine et ses étudiants ont développé deux prototypes "d'assistant mécanique" électriques. Ces modèles ont démontré qu'il était possible de créer un outil léger, autonome et respectueux du sol. 
 Notre Vision : 
La technologie au service du vivant!
Imaginez un véritable compagnon robuste pour le maraîcher, capable de porter des charges diverses, mais également, à terme, de pratiquer des opérations chronophages tout en limitant l’empreinte carbone de l'exploitation.
 Notre ambition est claire : 
Construire aujourd'hui un prototype professionnel, robuste et efficace, conçu avec et pour les maraîchers.
Ce projet rassemble des compétences complémentaires, toutes animées par la même conviction : L’avenir de l’agriculture passera par des outils sobres, durables et réparables, qui respectent la terre et celles et ceux qui la cultivent.
 Notre Équipe d'Experts :
Philippe et Tom de l'entreprise "Dumtis" : Deux concepteurs d’outils agricoles respectueux du vivant, inspirés par de nombreuses années de pratique sur le terrain.
Sébastien, Marie et Grégoire : Trois spécialistes en gestion de projets automatisés, garants d'un système fiable et intelligent.
Violette : Notre agronome maraîchère, assurant l'adéquation  entre les besoins réels du terrain et les solutions techniques que nous développons.
Rejoignez-nous pour suivre les avancées de Wallterre et participer à l'agriculture de demain !

-	à Saint-Quentin : box-saint-quentin.fr

Name: SOUNDTEC
Description:
SOUNDTEC: Your Partner in Audiovisual and Electroacoustic Solutions
At SOUNDTEC, we are more than just a technology company. 

SOUNDTEC is a seasoned technology company with 17 years of experience, specializing in audiovisual and electroacoustic solutions, and unified management systems. They offer comprehensive services, including design, installation, and implementation of various systems such as audiovisual, industrial and stage sound systems, projection systems, LED-posters, Digital Signage, and central and distributed BMS control systems. They also handle low-voltage installations, CCTV, SSWiN, Access Control, and event registration of working time counting with assignment of tasks (KANBAN system).

SOUNDTEC partners with top-tier brands like Bose, Yamaha, Optoma, NEC, BIAMP, Bosch, Martin Audio, Adeo, Barco, and others, ensuring high-quality solutions. They are committed to supporting architects and designers, actively participating in industry integration. Their services extend beyond implementation and installation, providing programming and ongoing support for years after project completion.

Their portfolio includes projects with Shilsner, Atal, Diagnostic Laboratories in Warsaw, Steripack, LG Chem factory, Ibis hotel, and Catholic Social Primary School No. 6 in Luboń, among others. They also boast of their involvement with Piwnica Świdnicka, the oldest restaurant in Europe. More details about their projects can be found on their website, www.soundtec.pl.

SOUNDTEC's offerings include conference systems, integrated control systems, conference systems with vote counting, web streaming systems, SSP systems (fire alarm systems), access control systems, monitoring systems, microphones, projection systems, and digital signage/monitors. They are dedicated to providing the best in audiovisual and electroacoustic technologies, tailoring solutions to meet unique client needs.

Name: MRI discovers consumer potential
Description: The MRI Discovers Consumer Potential 150 is a cutting-edge, non-clinical magnetic resonance imaging system designed to reveal hidden insights that drive consumer-focused innovation. Powered by a 0.5 Tesla permanent magnet, it captures high-resolution images of solid samples up to 150mm in diameter under extreme conditions—spanning −10°C to 110°C and pressures up to 20MPa. Integrated with advanced RF capabilities, precision gradient coils, and real-time environmental controls, it enables in-depth analysis of physical and chemical changes. Ideal for industries seeking to decode consumer needs, it empowers product development in materials, food, packaging, and sustainability-driven markets.

Name: BeautifulCities
Description:
About BeautifulCities

Cities face growing quality-of-life challenges:
urban cleanliness, litter, noise disturbances, citizen perception and overall attractiveness.

They already have teams, tools and field feedback.
What they often lack is a clear, objective and shared view to decide where to act, how to prioritize and how to measure results.

BeautifulCities helps cities and local authorities turn field data into action.

We specialize in two key areas that directly impact urban quality of life:

Urban cleanliness and litter management,

Urban noise prevention and monitoring.

Our approach combines on-the-ground observations, data modeling and analysis to move beyond perception and provide decision-makers with clear, usable and comparable indicators.

We help cities to:
– establish a shared baseline,
– identify real hotspots and priority areas,
– adjust human and technical resources,
– track progress over time,
– and build realistic, data-driven improvement roadmaps.

We do not judge teams, audit individuals or replace existing services.
We act as a trusted partner, supporting public authorities with objective insights that strengthen decision-making and long-term governance.

BeautifulCities helps cities see their territory more clearly —
so they can act more effectively,
improve quality of life,
and protect urban attractiveness.

Name: Sidac CNC Srl
Description:
SIDAC CNC, fondata nel 1984, si distingue nel settore dell’automazione e delle tecnologie avanzate. Con più di 35 anni di esperienza, l'azienda si impegna nella costante valorizzazione e formazione del suo personale, credendo fermamente nella collaborazione e nel singolo contributo professionale. Questo approccio si riflette nell'investimento continuo in software e hardware, oltre che nella progettazione di sistemi modulari CNC di alta qualità e affidabilità.

I sistemi CNC di SIDAC sono noti per la loro alta performance, affidabilità e sono costruiti con componentistica selezionata, software sofisticati e hardware personalizzati. Questi sistemi offrono una grande compatibilità e facilità d'uso, rispondendo alle esigenze specifiche di ogni cliente attraverso soluzioni su misura.

SIDAC CNC si posiziona come un partner unico per lo sviluppo e la personalizzazione di soluzioni high-tech, coprendo tutte le fasi dal consulenza alla selezione del prodotto, dalla progettazione alla realizzazione, e fino all’installazione e formazione post-vendita.

L'offerta di prodotti di SIDAC include moduli assi/PLC, azionamenti, interfacce operatore CNC, posizionatori, e servizi di retrofit e supporto tecnico, compresi corsi di formazione dedicati. Questo ampio raggio di competenze permette all'azienda di operare efficacemente in vari settori dell'automazione, offrendo consulenza, formazione e assistenza completa ai suoi clienti.

About Us

Moirai is a New York City-based fashion tech platform revolutionizing the way garments are designed and prepared for production. We simplify complex workflows, making advanced 3D fashion tools accessible to all—from emerging designers to established brands.

What We Do

Moirai is a browser-based platform that lets you design and modify garments in 3D with real-time simulation—no downloads, no high-performance hardware, no steep learning curve.

Through our curated library of base garments, users can:

- Edit 3D garments live by adjusting fabrics, lengths, colors, and shapes

- Visualize changes instantly with fast and intuitive 3D simulation

- Receive AI-powered assistance to generate and modify garments based on text input or sketches

- Export production-ready assets, including:
• 3D-rendered tech packs with detailed visuals and specs
• Editable sewing patterns (cartamodelli) customized in-platform

With Moirai, you save time, reduce prototyping costs, and bring your ideas closer to production—without needing a powerful computer or mastering complex software.

We're building the future of fashion development: streamlined, smart, and scalable.

Name: Procura
Description:
Procura is developing a marketplace-based platform for litigation lawyers – ZnajdzZastepstwo.pl. Our platform digitizes and automatizes the process of finding legal substitutes by pairing a lawyer with a verified, competent and recommended legal substitute to perform actions in a distant court.

ZnajdzZastepstwo.pl addresses the need to automate legal business, which in most European countries still operates in accordance with processes developed back in the last century. 

Until now, lawyers, due to the lack of the right tools, had to give up taking on cases that are conducted in distant cities, or spend up to several hours per hearing, to manually search for and verify legal substitutes - by phone, email or Facebook groups. By providing the digitization of the substitute search process, we save lawyers time and money, allowing them to focus on the merits of serving their clients. The search for a verified and competent substitute using our platform is reduced by up to 30 times compared to traditional methods. To address the issues of clients, our platform also allows them to close all communication in just one platform - from establishing contact, through communication related to the substitution, exchange and encryption of files, as well as settlement of invoices and finalization of the request, which is currently conducted through at least 4 platforms.

Name: Synerbia Sp. z o.o.
Description:
W Synerbi naszym celem jest zrewolucjonizowanie sektora zarządzania odpadami poprzez wdrażanie innowacyjnych technologii środowiskowych. Specjalizujemy się w tworzeniu i implementacji zaawansowanych systemów informatycznych, które wspierają przedsiębiorstwa w efektywnej i odpowiedzialnej gospodarce odpadami.

Nasza misja polega na dostarczaniu rozwiązań, które nie tylko optymalizują procesy operacyjne, ale również przyczyniają się do ochrony środowiska naturalnego. Poprzez integrację nowoczesnych technologii środowiskowych z najlepszymi praktykami ekologicznymi, Synerbia stawia na zrównoważony rozwój i innowacje, które pomagają firmom w zarządzaniu gospodarką odpadową.

Nasza oferta koncentruje się na platformie "followaste" - dedykowanym narzędziu do kompleksowego zarządzania odpadami produkcyjnymi. Dzięki funkcjonalnościom takim jak magazyn odpadów, obsługa wewnętrznej logistyki odpadowej oraz narzędzia do tworzenia raportów i optymalizacji procesów, "followaste" stanowi kompleksowe wsparcie dla przedsiębiorstw dążących do efektywności i zgodności z przepisami środowiskowymi.

Dla kogo? Nasze rozwiązania są zaprojektowane z myślą o szerokim zakresie branż. Od przemysłu produkcyjnego i wytwórczego, przez logistykę i transport, aż po kompleksową obsługę BDO, Synerbia oferuje wsparcie firmom na każdym etapie zarządzania odpadami a także zarządzania zasobami ludzkimi w organizacji.

Dołącz do nas w podróży ku lepszej przyszłości. Razem możemy tworzyć trwałe wartości dla Twojej firmy i środowiska.

Name: Bildstudio
Description:
IT tehnologije su nešto što nam je pasija. Iz tog razloga učenje i praćenje novih tehnologija ne pada nam teško i mi uživamo u tome. 
Pre više od 20 godina ljubav prema tehnologiji pretvorila se u želju da se stečeno znanje podeli sa drugima i pretvori u pružanje usluga. 
Naš fokus se zadržao na web tehnologijama, tako da su i naše usluge najviše fokusirane na izradu web sajtova i izradu virtuelnih tura. 
Ove dve usluge pružamo po sistemu "ključ u ruke", tako da ukoliko ste zainteresovani za web sajt ili web shop, pored izrade i dizajna istog, sa nama možete dogovoriti i kompletno pisanje tekstova odnosno copywriting, prevod na engleski i/ili španski jezik, fotografisanje vaših proizvoda ili usluga, izradu virtuelne ture vašeg poslovnog objekta, izradu PDF kataloga...

Usluge koje imamo u ponudi su:

1.  Izrada internet prezentacija i web shopova
2.   Izrada virtuelnih šetnji (fotografisanje objekata u 360 stepeni)
3.   Fotografisanje proizvoda u 360 stepeni
4.   Snimanje dronom u 360 stepeni, snimanje videa, fotografisanje dronom
5.   360 fotografije za Booking, AirBNB, Google Maps,  kao i HDR fotografije širokougaonim objekivom
6.   Prevodi svih vrsta dokumenata sa engleskog i španskog na srpski jezik i obrnuto
7.   Kreiranje korporativnih promo videa

Za sva pitanja, sugestije i predloge, stojimo vam na raspolaganju...
Obratite nam se za sve vaše ideje i zamisli koje želite da realizujete, kako bismo zajednički kreirali pojektni plan i u što kraćem roku vam ponudili rešenje po principu "ključ u ruke"! Tim BILDSTUDIJA stoji vam na raspolaganju.

Wir sind ein innovatives Unternehmen, das sich auf die Entwicklung von digitalen Produkten auf Basis von Internet of Things (IoT) und Künstlicher Intelligenz (KI) spezialisiert hat. Unser Ansatz ermöglicht es uns, einzigartige und maßgeschneiderte Lösungen anzubieten, die auf die spezifischen Bedürfnisse unserer Kunden zugeschnitten sind. Durch die enge Verknüpfung von Hardware und Software können wir Produkte entwickeln, die nicht nur technologisch fortschrittlich sind, sondern auch eine optimale Benutzererfahrung bieten.

Our Tele-health includes scheduled mental health visits online or by phone, and discounts on other services like, dental, vision, diabetic supplies, lab work, and chiropractic for a family of up to 8 people#.

CrewCare includes additional services for workers at no cost to the employer or employee. Some of these additional benefits are:
1.	The CrewCare Perks mobile app, which gives your workers a full-service discount program. Discounts are available at over 1 million restaurants, retail and/or travel related businesses. 
2.	CrewCare Credit-Pal is a web-tool that provides your workers with access to expert disputing & removal of negative credit items, and proper education on tradeline usage, maintenance or creation.
3.	CrewCare Rideshare mobile app, enables workmates to earn extra money outside of your organization, by offering rideshare services to fellow employees easily, without needing cash, or creating a liability to your business. 
4.	CrewCare TLC (Top Level Connect) let’s owners systematize worker appreciation. TLC makes it easier to recognize, reward, and award employees for excellence and loyalty.

At our core, we believe that good systems run the business, and good people run the systems.
