Name: Boxter
Description:
Boxter er et projekt under spejdergruppen Invictus Gruppen. Formålet med Boxter-projektet er at gøre det nemmere for frivillige at lave engagerende naturoplevelser for børn og unge i Danmark. Projektet skal både være til gavn for frivillige, der skaber oplevelser, og for deltagende børn og unge.

Projektet består af udviklingen af 20 Boxter-kasser, samt tilhørende software, der kan bruges til at facilitere friluftsaktiviteter. Boxter er en digital løsning til afvikling af aktiviteter i det fri. Boxter består både af hardware, som tages med ud i naturen, hvor aktiviteten afholdes, samt af software, som styrer både aktiviteten og de tilkoblede hardware-komponenter. Med det kan vi gøre friluftsoplevelser moderne, uden at brugerne skal bruge en telefon eller anden skærm.

Der kan ses mere om teknologien og mulige aktiviteter på www.boxter.dk
Da projektet er nyt og innovativt kræves det, at softwaren kodes fra bunden, og at hardwaren designes på ny, hvilket betyder, at projektet hurtigt stiger i kompleksitet. Her refereres til de adskillelige dele i projektet som design af hardware, udvikling af software, hosting og deployering af softwareløsningen. Boxter som produkt er derfor en omfattende løsning med mange facetter. Det betyder at mulighederne med Boxter er vidtrækkende.

Vision: Boxters vision er at gøre friluftsliv mere tilgængeligt for børn og unge, ved at gøre det nemmere for frivillige at planlægge og afholde fede aktiviteter.

Mission: Vi vil rykke grænserne for moderne friluftsliv ved at koble moderne teknologi til traditionelle outdooraktiviteter.

Name: INDEET
Description:
INDEET es una ingeniería y consultoría especializada en el diseño de producto electrónico y tecnológico. Nuestro objetivo principal es ayudar a nuestros clientes a convertir sus ideas en productos innovadores y exitosos.

Podemos aportarle 10 años de experiencia en el sector y le acompoñamos durante todas las fases del proceso de creación. Pero sabemos que crear un producto electrónico solo es el primer paso, por ello le ofrecemos el mantenimiento del mismo.

Aplicamos enfoques Agiles de gestión de proyectos y dividimos el proceso de diseño en tres fases: 
☞ Estudio: realizamos un estudio de los requisitos y especificaciones que nos transmita. Proponemos la solución que más se ajuste a su caso y pruebas de concepto para que valore la solución.
☞ Diseño: desarrollamos la solución desde la selección de componentes, diseño del circuito impreso y programación del equipo.
☞ Validación: realizamos prototipos para validar el diseño junto al cliente.

Le ofrecemos cualquier servicio que tenga relación con los productos electrónicos:
➤ Diseño eléctronico integral.
➤ Programación de Sistemas Embebidos basados en microcontroladores y microprocesadores con Linux embebido.
➤ Implementación de comunicaciones e IOT.
➤ Fabricación de prototipos.
➤ Certificación del producto de acuerdo a la normativa.
➤ Apoyo a la fabricación en serie.
➤ Estudios técnicos.

¿Tiene un proyecto tecnológico en mente o necesita soluciones para su producto actual? Entonces queremos ayudarte! Contáctenos hoy mismo.

Name: CHBL Serviços

Description:
INFINY SYS est une holding en pleine croissance, spécialisée dans l’acquisition stratégique d’entreprises dans les secteurs de l’informatique et des télécoms. Notre mission est de racheter et d’intégrer des sociétés performantes pour construire un groupe puissant et innovant, capable de répondre aux défis technologiques de demain.

Au cœur de notre stratégie se trouve notre modèle de Fournisseur de Services Managés (MSP), qui nous permet d’offrir une gestion optimisée et proactive des infrastructures IT et télécoms. En rejoignant INFINY SYS, vos entreprises bénéficient de synergies uniques, renforcées par l’expertise de nos filiales, INFINY LINK et HEGO TECH, leaders dans leurs domaines respectifs.

Nous recherchons activement des sociétés ambitieuses, prêtes à s’intégrer dans un groupe qui valorise l’innovation, la collaboration et l’excellence opérationnelle. En tant que MSP, nous assurons non seulement une gestion efficace des technologies, mais aussi une stratégie de croissance durable qui maximise le potentiel de chaque entreprise acquise.

Notre approche d’acquisition repose sur une vision partagée de la réussite, tout en respectant les valeurs et l’identité propres à chaque société que nous intégrons. Nous offrons un cadre solide pour une expansion réussie, où chaque acquisition renforce notre capacité à innover et à créer de la valeur pour l’ensemble du groupe.

Si vous envisagez de céder votre entreprise et que vous recherchez un partenaire capable d’investir dans votre croissance future à travers un modèle MSP éprouvé, INFINY SYS est votre allié idéal. Ensemble, faisons grandir vos idées et vos succès au sein d’un groupe ambitieux et visionnaire.

Name: solveit.design
Description:
Introducing Solveit.Design — Rethinking How the World Innovates in an AI-First Era For years, we watched technology evolve — Web-First, Mobile-First… and now AI-First. Yet one thing hasn’t evolved fast enough:

Innovation Culture.
Despite all the tools, talent, and funding, 80% of products and ideas still fail.
Not because the technology is weak — but because the thinking behind it is.
Today, I’m excited to announce Solveit.Design — my new Design Innovation Practice built to change this narrative.

Why Solveit.Design?
Because the future belongs to organizations who can:
•	Think systemically, not just functionally
•	Innovate with empathy + intelligence, not guesswork
•	Build for long-term value, not short-term output
•	Craft AI systems that are meaningful, contextual, and responsible
•	Bridge the gap between strategy, design, and technology

Innovation isn’t an act.
It’s an environment you build. And that’s exactly where Solveit.Design comes in.

What We Do
Solveit.Design helps organizations build the Design + Innovation Operating System they never had — the mindset, methods, and mechanisms that turn ideas into scalable, sustainable, real-world impact.
We specialize in:
 Design Thinking for AI Systems
 System-Centric Design
 AI-First Product & Experience Strategy
 Design Culture Transformation
 Opportunity Mapping & Innovation Kernels
 Mixed-Initiative Interaction Models
 UX Strategy for Enterprise & Industrial Systems

This isn’t consulting.
This is re-architecting how organizations innovate.

The Vision
To help industries evolve from…
“building features” to  designing intelligent systems that think, adapt, and elevate humans.

To move from… "random ideas and hackathons" to "systemized, responsible, repeatable innovation"

To shift from… AI hype to AI with clarity, ethics, and purpose.

Name: TIMEPLACEME, Inc
Description:
TIMEPLACEME | The First-Time Experience Discovery Engine. 

TIMEPLACEME is an AI-powered platform that transforms available activities into new customer acquisition channels. We aggregate supply from two sources: businesses (available slots) and individuals (activities they can't use), turning them into powerful marketing assets.

The Problem: Billions of euros are lost annually in the experience economy due to "spoilage" (no-shows) and last-minute cancellations. 

The Solution: Instead of standard algorithms that show "more of the same," our proprietary AI Reverse Discovery Engine uses "Fire/Ice" reverse filtering.  
 We identify users' blind spots and match them with experiences they ignore or avoid. 

How it works:

For Business: Venues and organizers convert empty seats into net-new customers (Inventory Recovery).

For Users (P2P): Individuals can anonymously gift tickets they can't use. Our system ensures the gift finds a "first-timer" — someone who has never tried this experience before. 

The Match: We deliver "Engineered Serendipity." By strictly targeting new audiences, we ensure zero cannibalization for the business while unlocking a unique discovery for the recipient. 

Our Mission: To break the digital filter bubble and prove that the best experiences are the ones you didn't know you wanted.

 Follow our startup journey & experiments in our channel: t.me/timeplaceme (Join for backstage stories and our first gifting round flight ).

 Built at Founder Institute  Based in Portugal

Core Focus: #AdTech #InventoryRecovery #AI #TravelTech #BehavioralEconomics

Description:
شركة تصميم مواقع في الرياض تصميم الويب هو المجال الذي يتضمن واجهات رقمية مثل مواقع الويب والتطبيقات والخدمات.

باستخدام كود HTML لبرمجة مواقع الويب و CSS لتوحيد لغتها المرئية ، فإن محترفي تصميم الويب مسؤولون عن بناء الخبرات الرقمية ليستخدمها الجمهور. الهدف هو تقديم تجربة عالية الجودة للجمهور ومساعدة الأعمال التجارية على تحقيق أهدافها.

على هذا النحو ، فإن مصمم الويب هو محترف يكتسب المهارات اللازمة لأداء هذه الوظيفة. قد يكون هؤلاء متخصصين في مجالات تصميم الويب المحددة ، بدءًا من إنشاء مواقع الويب إلى تطوير تطبيقات الأجهزة المحمولة. في جميع الأحوال ، الهدف هو نفسه: تجسيد رؤية المشروع.

نظرة عامة على خدمات شركة تصميم مواقع في الرياضشركة تصميم المواقع الإلكترونية الاحترافية

تقدم شركة تصميم مواقع في الرياض الاحترافية مجموعة من الخدمات المصممة لإنشاء مواقع ويب جذابة وعملية لعملائها. إنهم يقدمون خدمات مثل تصميم الويب وتطويره وصيانته لضمان تواجد سلس عبر الإنترنت. بالإضافة إلى ذلك، فإنها توفر خيارات تصميم سريعة الاستجابة وحلول التجارة الإلكترونية وتحسين محركات البحث لتحسين أداء موقع الويب ورؤيته. ومن خلال فهم أحدث اتجاهات وتقنيات التصميم، يمكن لهذه الشركات تقديم مواقع ويب مخصصة تلبي الاحتياجات الفريدة للشركات في مختلف الصناعات.

أهمية الموقع الإلكتروني المصمم بشكل جيد

يلعب موقع الويب المصمم جيدًا دورًا حاسمًا في إنشاء تواجد قوي عبر الإنترنت للشركات. فهو لا يعزز مصداقية العلامة التجارية واحترافيتها فحسب، بل يعمل أيضًا على تحسين تجربة المستخدم ومشاركته. يمكن لموقع الويب الجذاب بصريًا وسهل الاستخدام أن يجذب المزيد من الزوار، ويزيد معدلات التحويل، ويؤدي في النهاية إلى دفع نمو الأعمال. علاوة على ذلك، يعد موقع الويب المصمم جيدًا أمرًا بالغ الأهمية لاستراتيجيات التسويق الرقمي الفعالة، لأنه بمثابة الأساس لجميع الأنشطة عبر الإنترنت. من خلال الاستثمار في خدمات شركة تصميم مواقع في الرياض الاحترافية، يمكن للشركات أن تميز نفسها عن المنافسين وتترك انطباعًا دائمًا لدى جمهورها المستهدف.

العثور على شركة تصميم مواقع في الرياض الاحترافية المناسبة

Description:
Paihubtech: Inovação Conectada para um Futuro Inteligente e Sustentável
Na Paihubtech, não somos apenas uma empresa de tecnologia; somos um hub de inovação dedicado a redefinir os limites do possível em um mundo cada vez mais conectado e consciente. Com um DNA profundamente enraizado em Inteligência Artificial (IA), Automação e Robótica, impulsionamos a transformação digital e ambiental de nossos parceiros e do planeta.

Nossa expertise central reside na capacidade de transformar dados complexos em inteligência acionável. Somos mestres em automação de IAs para web scraping, construindo sistemas robustos que coletam, processam e analisam volumes massivos de dados da web com precisão inigualável. Essa capacidade permite que empresas tomem decisões estratégicas mais rápidas, identifiquem tendências de mercado e otimizem suas operações com uma base informacional sólida e continuamente atualizada.

Vamos além do digital, mergulhando no mundo físico com nossa especialização em Robótica. No coração de nossas soluções está a Robótica Subaquática, onde projetamos e implementamos sistemas autônomos para monitoramento, inspeção e coleta de dados em ambientes aquáticos desafiadores. Essa tecnologia é um pilar fundamental para nosso compromisso com o meio ambiente.

Na Paihubtech, a sustentabilidade e a Tech Verde não são apenas conceitos, mas a base para o desenvolvimento de soluções que impactam positivamente o planeta. Nossas inovações incluem:

Monitoramento Ambiental Inteligente: Utilizando IA e robótica subaquática, desenvolvemos sistemas para monitorar a saúde de ecossistemas aquáticos, detectar poluentes, rastrear a biodiversidade e prever mudanças ambientais, como o Projeto Aquabotia.

Otimização de Recursos: Nossas soluções de automação e IA auxiliam empresas a reduzir o consumo de energia, otimizar cadeias de suprimentos e minimizar o desperdício, contribuindo para operações mais ecológicas.
Operamos com um modelo 100% offsite, abraçando a flexibilidade e a autonomia.

Name: Ruby Digital Agency
Description:
Ruby Digital Agency (RDA) is a Shopify-focused ecommerce studio that helps brands turn “just another store” into a predictable revenue engine. RDA specializes in migrations from platforms like WordPress, Magento 2, Shift4Shop, and custom builds into high-performing Shopify and Shopify Plus stores that load fast, convert better, and are easier to operate day to day.

For growing brands, RDA handles the unglamorous complexity: data extraction and cleanup, URL and SEO-safe redirects, theme selection or fully custom theme builds, app and subscription integrations, and performance tuning that protects rankings while lifting conversion rate and average order value. The agency’s roots are in hands-on development rather than pure strategy, so every recommendation is grounded in what actually works in code, in analytics, and in your P&L.

Clients typically come to RDA when they are stuck on legacy platforms, fighting technical debt, or losing money to slow, buggy, or poorly architected storefronts. Engagements are structured around clear revenue-focused outcomes—faster launches, smoother operations, higher LTV—not endless retainer hours, with transparent communication and tight scope control.

Beyond net-new builds and replatforming, RDA supports brands with ongoing CRO, UX refinements, and technical maintenance so marketing teams can move quickly without breaking the storefront. Typical work includes navigation and collection architecture, search and merchandising optimization, checkout and subscription flows, and automation with tools like email, reviews, and loyalty platforms.

If you run a scaling ecommerce brand and need a partner who can migrate you cleanly to Shopify, squeeze more revenue out of existing traffic, and ship reliably on time and on budget, connect with Ruby Digital Agency here on LinkedIn or via the contact page on the RDA site.

Name: Nima Designer | تیم طراحی و توسعه وب
Description:
ما یک تیم فریلنسری از طراحان و توسعهدهندگان وب هستیم که از سراسر ایران جمع آمدهایم تا به افراد و کسب و کارهای مختلف در تحقق رویاهای دیجیتالیشان کمک کنیم. تیم ما تنوع تخصصی متعددی دارد، و این تنوع تضمین میکند که میتوانیم به هر نیاز و پروژهای پاسخ دهیم، از طراحی وبسایتهای ساده تا پیچیده، ما میتوانم به شما کمک کنیم تا یک حضور آنلاین قدرتمند و جذاب بسازید. 

چرا با ما کار کنید؟

تخصص و تجربه: هر یک از اعضای تیم ما تخصص آزموده در زمینههای مختلف طراحی و توسعه وب دارند. از طراحی رابط کاربری گرفته تا توسعه وبسایتهای پیچیده، ما دانش و تجربه مورد نیاز شما را داریم.

تمرکز بر رضایت مشتری: ما به کارهایمان علاقهمندیم و به اهمیت رضایت مشتری اولویت میدهیم. همواره تلاش میکنیم تا انتظارات شما را بیشتر از آنچه انتظار دارید، برآورده کنیم.

تعامل و همکاری: ما با شما همواره در تعامل هستیم و به عنوان بخشی از تیم شما عمل میکنیم. ایدهها و بازخوردهای شما برای ما ارزشمند هستند.

پروژههای سفارشی: ما هر پروژه را به عنوان یک چالش جدید در نظر میگیریم و سعی داریم تا وبسایتی منحصر به فرد و متناسب با نیازهای شما ایجاد کنیم.

بهروزی با تکنولوژیهای جدید: ما همواره به روز با تازهترین تکنولوژیها و روشهای توسعه وب هستیم تا وبسایتهای شما بهینه و مدرن باشند.

خدمات ما:

طراحی و توسعه وبسایتهای سفارشی-
توسعه فروشگاه آنلاین و ایستگاههای تجاری-
بهینهسازی سرعت و بهینهسازی موتورهای جستجو (SEO)-
طراحی رابط کاربری (UI) و تجربه کاربری (UX)-

Name: Novavia Solutions
Description:
Novavia Solutions offers its expertise in information systems design to support innovation teams that develop technology solutions to physical world operations, covering sectors such as manufacturing, transportation, utilities, mining, or agriculture. Our clients may be startup enterprises, academic research teams or skunk works projects within larger organizations, aiming to improve safety, efficiency, and environmental stewardship by leveraging IoT, digital twins, machine learning, AI, and robotics.
Novavia Solutions works with its clients to strategically design and deliver durable software solutions that boost the productivity and effectiveness of their R&D teams. This includes drafting cloud-native and serverless software architecture for physical operations use cases; designing, implementing, and deploying storage, data processing, business intelligence or ML/AI infrastructure components; and integrating third-party or legacy systems to unlock innovation.
Novavia Solutions also helps teams reach their full potential, additionally offering to design workflows and procedures to improve DevOps, MLOps, security or data governance; providing fractional leadership and/or change management assistance; and delivering training, technical assistance, staffing and other supporting activities.
Finally, Novavia Solutions helps its customers bring their innovations to market by collecting operational insights, formulating a realistic theory of change, and adapting emerging technologies to their intended application. This may include strategic product development consulting, scouting new markets, and assisting pilot deployments, from design to project management, audits, and post-mortems.
Novavia Solutions is founded on a bedrock of excellence, originality, and purpose. Now more than ever, the entire world needs to strive to better utilize our finite resources. Together, let us imagine and assemble a more sustainable and generous future!

ما با تیمی مجرب و خلاق، متشکل از متخصصان طراح و توسعهدهنده وب، در کنار شما خواهیم بود تا رویای تجارت آنلاینتان را به واقعیت تبدیل کنیم.

طراحی و توسعه وب سایتهای شرکتی، فروشگاهی و خدماتی

پشتیبانی و نگهداری وب سایت

مشاوره در زمینه تجارت الکترونیک
چرا پیشوا را انتخاب کنید؟

تجربه و تخصص: ما با سالها تجربه در زمینه طراحی و توسعه وب سایت، به شما در ایجاد یک وب سایت حرفهای و کارآمد کمک میکنیم.
خلاقیت و نوآوری: تیم ما همواره در تلاش است تا با استفاده از جدیدترین تکنولوژیها و ایدههای خلاقانه، وب سایتهایی منحصر به فرد و متناسب با نیازهای شما طراحی و توسعه دهد.
پشتیبانی و تعهد: ما به تعهدات خود پایبندیم و پس از اتمام پروژه نیز در کنار شما خواهیم بود تا از وب سایتتان پشتیبانی و نگهداری کنیم.

Name: Business Intelligence Servicess
Description:
Business Intelligence (BI) services refer to a suite of technologies, tools, and practices designed to collect, analyze, and present business data to help organizations make informed, data-driven decisions. These services enable businesses to transform raw data into actionable insights that can drive strategic planning, improve operational efficiency, and support a competitive edge.

Key components of BI services include:

Data Collection & Integration: Gathering data from various sources such as databases, cloud systems, and third-party platforms. This process ensures that all relevant data is accessible and consolidated for analysis.

Data Warehousing: Storing data in a centralized repository where it can be easily accessed and queried for analysis. Data warehouses ensure that businesses have a single source of truth.

Data Analysis & Reporting: Applying analytical tools and techniques to interpret data trends and patterns. BI services provide customizable reports, dashboards, and visualizations that enable stakeholders to monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) and make data-driven decisions.

Predictive Analytics & Forecasting: Leveraging advanced algorithms and machine learning techniques to predict future trends, helping organizations plan for upcoming opportunities or challenges.

Data Visualization: Creating graphical representations of data that make complex information more accessible and actionable. Tools like dashboards, charts, and graphs are used to present insights in a user-friendly format.

Decision Support: Providing decision-makers with the necessary information, analysis, and tools to optimize business strategies, improve processes, and achieve organizational goals.

Consulting & Strategy Development: BI service providers often offer consulting to assist organizations in defining their BI strategy, implementing BI tools, and optimizing workflows to ensure maximum ROI from BI investments.

Benefits of BI Services:

Enhanced Decision-Making: By u

Name: Systems of Impact
Description:
My mission is to ensure that every purpose-driven organisation, regardless of its size or budget, has access to the latest technology to maximise its impact.

MY PHILOSOPHY

In today's fast-paced world, there's an undeniable technological gap between corporate giants and purpose-driven organisations like not-for-profits. Despite being driven by passionate individuals and noble missions, purpose-driven organisations often find themselves lacking the time or expertise to fix technological problems, and get bogged down in process and bureaucracy – barriers to effectively fulfilling our missions. Meanwhile, the corporations we’re trying to fight have cutting-edge data analytics, automated system efficiency, and are fully embracing the AI revolution. But there's a way to bridge this gap, and that's where I come in.

MY STORY

Over the last 7 years, I've worked with a dozen for-purpose organisations. Time and time again, I’ve come across technological challenges getting between your driven people and the impact that you’re trying to create. It’s the little bottlenecks that add frustrations: locating data in clunky spreadsheets; unwieldy monthly impact report processes, and meaningless copying and pasting.

When I’ve seen it in my organisations, I’ve been able to change the game. I located each bottleneck and invested the time to work out how to resolve them using my tech know-how and problem-solving abilities.

And now I want to do the same for you! In the for-purpose sector, impact needs to be at the forefront of what we need to do, but we can’t achieve anything while we’re stuck behind dodgy systems. Let’s make a change together.

Name: PMOFLEX
Description:
O PMOaaS (Project Management Office as a Service) está revolucionando a gestão de projetos. Ao contrário do PMO tradicional, este modelo oferece uma solução sob demanda, flexível e escalável, permitindo que as empresas contratem serviços de gestão de projetos conforme suas necessidades, sem a rigidez de estruturas fixas.

Principais Vantagens do PMOaaS:

Flexibilidade: Ajuste a equipe e os recursos de acordo com o ciclo de vida dos projetos. O PMOaaS se adapta às necessidades do seu negócio, permitindo escalar ou reduzir operações rapidamente.

Redução de Custos: Sem a necessidade de manter uma equipe interna fixa, as empresas pagam apenas pelos serviços usados, otimizando recursos e eliminando custos indiretos com contratações permanentes.

Acesso a Especialistas: O PMOaaS oferece acesso imediato a consultores especializados, garantindo que áreas críticas dos projetos sejam gerenciadas com alta competência e eficiência, sem processos burocráticos.

Agilidade: Ideal para empresas que precisam se adaptar a um mercado dinâmico, o PMOaaS permite que mudanças no escopo e nas prioridades sejam absorvidas rapidamente, mantendo a competitividade.

Foco em Resultados: O modelo garante entrega de resultados estratégicos, oferecendo visibilidade completa sobre o progresso e a performance dos projetos sem a necessidade de gerir uma estrutura interna.

Tecnologia Integrada: O PMOaaS frequentemente inclui ferramentas modernas de ERP e gestão de projetos, fornecendo controle sobre orçamento, cronogramas e recursos com relatórios em tempo real para tomadas de decisão mais assertivas.

O PMOaaS é ideal para empresas que buscam agilidade, eficiência e flexibilidade, sem os custos e desafios de manter uma estrutura interna. Esse modelo permite que o foco permaneça no crescimento do negócio, enquanto a gestão de projetos é realizada por especialistas.

Comnirex kan medewerkers/BHV'ers indien gewenst automatisch aanmelden bij binnenkomst. Anders dan bij de meeste digitale receptionisten gaat dat niet via GPS, maar via Wifi.

Inzicht in historische bezoekersdata
Comnirex slaat data zelf en automatisch op. Dat gebeurt niet op een externe server waardoor gegevens het gebouw niet verlaten. Wel zo veilig.

Voldoe aan de veiligheidsnormen
Gaat het brandalarm af, dan weet je precies hoeveel personen er aanwezig. En wordt er iemand binnen jouw bedrijf onwel? Dankzij Comnirex weet je welke BHV’ers er aanwezig zijn. Zo voldoe je automatisch aan de ISO 9001-norm en aan het RI&E- en het BHV-plan.

Gebruik automatische meldingen
Via mail of per telefoon kun je een bericht krijgen wanneer iemand zich aanmeldt. Heel handig als je bijvoorbeeld een afspraak hebt en/of de receptioniste er even niet is.

Maandelijks een vaste lage prijs
Je hoeft de Comnirex niet aan te schaffen. Je betaalt een vaste lage prijs per maand. Installatie is altijd gratis, ook als je enkel gebruik maakt van de proefperiode.

Name: AerBIM
Description:
AerBIM is a software company focused on the development of automation systems for design in BIM technology. 

We are dedicated to the development of solutions using programming language C# and mathematical algorithms for integration into Autodesk Revit software.
Our solutions help to reduce time spent on routine technical tasks in the design in BIM technology and develop effective engineering solutions. They are useful for corporate project teams that are working on the design of large-scale facilities.

AerBIM participates in Autodesk Developer Network (Standard) program. 
We design engineering systems in BIM technology (Autodesk Revit software) and specialize in low-voltage networks, engineering and technical security systems:
•	Security alarm systems, television systems (CCTV), access control systems
•	Fire protection systems such as fire alarm systems, warning and evacuation management systems, sprinkler systems (automatic fire extinguishing: water/gas/powder/foam/aerosol), smoke ventilation systems
•	Communication networks such as local computing networks and structured cabling systems

AerBIM project team consists of professionals with specialized education and more than 5 years of experience of the designing and development of BIM models and families. Autodesk Revit is a basic program in the designing for them. 

AerBIM guarantees high quality and speed of implementation of projects due to our own plugin 3D Security Designer. We automate different routine processes and reduce time spent on designing in Autodesk Revit environment.

Name: SecureMind
Description:
SecureMind to innowacyjna platforma stworzona z myślą o kompleksowym wspieraniu firm w zarządzaniu bezpieczeństwem informacji (ISMS). Wierzymy, że cyberbezpieczeństwo powinno być intuicyjne, zautomatyzowane i dostępne dla każdego przedsiębiorstwa – niezależnie od jego wielkości czy branży.

Nasza aplikacja to znacznie więcej niż narzędzie. To zintegrowane centrum dowodzenia, które prowadzi Twoją organizację przez cały proces budowania solidnej kultury bezpieczeństwa. Upraszczamy złożone wymogi prawne i techniczne, przekładając je na praktyczne działania, które realnie podnoszą poziom ochrony danych i minimalizują ryzyka.

SecureMind wspiera firmy w proaktywnym zarządzaniu bezpieczeństwem, pomagając im reagować na zagrożenia zanim te wpłyną na ciągłość działania. Dzięki rozbudowanej automatyzacji procesów oraz intuicyjnemu interfejsowi nasi klienci mogą skupić się na rozwoju biznesu, mając pewność, że ich organizacja jest zgodna z wymogami i odpowiednio chroniona.

Naszym celem jest stworzenie praktycznego przewodnika po cyberbezpieczeństwie, który nie tylko pokazuje „co trzeba zrobić”, ale przede wszystkim „jak to zrobić”. SecureMind pozwala wdrożyć najlepsze standardy bezpieczeństwa w sposób przejrzysty i efektywny, wspierając długofalowy rozwój i odporność biznesu.

Name: Tamos Aqui
Description:
O crescimento do número de autistas tem dado saltos gigantescos. No ano 2000, uma em cada cento e cinquenta crianças tinha autismo. Em 2025, essa proporção é de uma para cada trinta e uma. 
Quer dizer, um autista em cada turma de uma escola regular. São dados dos Estados Unidos, mas aplicáveis em todo o mundo, inclusive aqui no Brasil. 
Apesar de as famílias atípicas estarem imersas num mar de possibilidades, com tantos produtos e serviços novos sendo criados para os seus desafios, elas ficam desorientadas. É tanta informação que ninguém sabe por onde começar, em quem confiar, quais as soluções mais adequadas ou onde encontrar especialistas. 
Tamos Aqui chega como a única plataforma que reúne as crescentes soluções para os desafios desse público. De forma democrática, segura e organizada. 
Isso por meio de: 
• Aplicativo – que está no ar na como buscador de prestadores de serviços especializados, onde já temos profissionais e instituições com suas diversas soluções para os autistas. De médicos a advogados, passando por dentistas, escolas, cães assistivos, cabeleireiros etc.. Esse app vai ganhar outras funcionalidades no futuro. 
• Comunidade – começa agora no Instagram, feita para apresentar soluções que já existem e promover valiosas trocas de experiências entre familiares, profissionais especializados e empresas. 
• Projetos de conteúdo patrocinado – veiculados em uma segunda fase.

Nossos valores: 
People-first
Otimismo
Diversidade
Colaboração
Empoderamento

Description:
Torch Networks is a Structured Cabling and Information Technology integration firm with extensive experience designing, implementing, and supporting low-voltage cabling design, technology solutions, and complex networks in the Hospitality, MDU, Education, and Small Enterprise business sectors.  We specialize in technology survey and assessment, RF and network solution design, project management and implementation, systems cost analysis, and Managed IT support services for business owners and hotel ownership and management groups.  

One of the most difficult challenges facing business owners today is navigating through the large number of technology vendors, systems, and integration requirements for their business network. Additionally, major hotel brands are implementing complicated and constantly changing technology and structured cabling standards that make it more difficult for hotel owners and operators to understand what they need to do to stay compliant with these new requirements.    

With over 60 years of combined industry experience ranging from low-voltage cabling, hotel operations, and hotel ownership/management to IT support, network engineering, technology sales, and managed IT support services, Torch Networks brings a comprehensive and diverse skill set to illuminate your technology path and manage all aspects of the process from start to finish. Name: Patent Drawings services
Description:
We provide patent drawing services for a wide range of industries and clients, including individuals, small businesses, and large corporations. Our team of experienced patent illustrators has the skills and knowledge needed to create high-quality patent drawings that meet all of the requirements for a successful patent application.

Utility Patent Drawings

Our utility patent drawings are carefully crafted to provide the necessary details and information for a successful patent application. We work closely with our clients to ensure that all aspects of their invention are accurately depicted, including any complex or intricate details. Our utility patent drawings meet all of the USPTO’s requirements and are created to help maximize the likelihood of a successful patent application.

Design Patent Drawings

We understand the importance of design patent drawings and the role they play in protecting a product’s unique appearance. Our team has experience creating design patent drawings for a variety of products, from consumer goods to industrial equipment. We work closely with our clients to ensure that every detail of the design is accurately captured, and that the final product meets all of the USPTO’s requirements for design patents.

Trademark design

Our traderademark Drawingsmark drawings are designed to accurately capture the unique design or logo of our clients’ brands. We understand the importance of a strong brand and work closely with our clients to ensure that their trademark drawings accurately reflect the essence of their brand. Our trademark drawings meet all of the USPTO’s requirements for trademark registration, ensuring that our clients’ brands are fully protected.

We take pride in providing high-quality patent drawing services to our clients. Our team is dedicated to meeting and exceeding our clients’ expectations, and we’re committed to delivering accurate and precise patent drawings that help our clients protect their intellectual property.

Name: Ekopol Górnośląski Holding SA

- Dystrybucji i magazynowania paliw płynnych.
Pod postacią marek własnych: Mikrostacje.pl oraz EkopolOil, spółka hurtowo dystrybuuje olej napędowy z dostawą do klienta lub odbiorem własnym z bazy paliw. Działalność wsparta jest sprzedażą dwupłaszczowych zbiorników do magazynowania ON wyposażonych w innowacyjny i autorski system zarządzania paliwami Mikrostacje.pl.
Spółka jako jeden z pierwszych podmiotów w kraju rozwija również dystrybucję alternatywnych paliw płynnych HVO - będących ekologiczną odpowiedzią na tradycyjny olej napędowy.

- Budownictwa
Wysoki potencjał do inwestowania pozwolił spółce na wejście w rynek deweloperski. Efektem tych działań została budowa oraz sprzedaż wolnostojących domów jednorodzinnych.

- Projektowania oraz wdrażania informatycznych systemów zarządzania przedsiębiorstwem. Pod postacią technologii takich jak Ekopol TimeBOX do zarządzania czasem pracy czy BlackBOX do monitorowania flot pojazdów i maszyn.

Name: MC Systems
Description:
A MC Systems IoT desenvolve soluções completas e personalizadas em Internet das Coisas (IoT), com foco em automação, integração de sistemas e monitoramento centralizado de ativos.

Nossa solução principal, o PlugIN, é uma plataforma proprietária, com hardware e software 100% desenvolvidos pela MC Systems, que permite customização total, escalabilidade e controle completo da operação IoT.

O PlugIN realiza leitura bidirecional, captura dados de sensores e dispositivos, e os envia para um dashboard responsivo acessível via web, que permite visualizar informações em tempo real, gerar alertas, tomar decisões e executar ações automatizadas.

As ações podem incluir o acionamento de outros equipamentos, integração com sistemas legados via API ou até respostas inteligentes com IA. O PlugIN unifica a gestão de ativos em uma única visão operacional, ideal para Centros de Controle Operacional (CCO) e Centros de Controle Ambiental (CCA).

Desde 2000, a MC Systems atua com inovação e foco em resultados, entregando projetos de IoT sob medida para empresas que buscam mais inteligência, conectividade e eficiência operacional.

Name: TECHMINDS REVOLUTION
Description:

Naszą misją jest wspieranie firm w transformacji cyfrowej poprzez dostarczanie narzędzi, które realnie upraszczają złożone procesy, obniżają koszty operacyjne i zwiększają efektywność działania.

Jednym z kluczowych produktów firmy jest Brain – inteligentna platforma analityczna dla sektora transportu i logistyki, która łączy funkcje zarządzania śladem węglowym, predykcji kosztów, raportowania KPI oraz monitorowania trendów rynkowych. Brain wykorzystuje technologie cyfrowych bliźniaków, AI oraz integrację z systemami telemetrycznymi i ERP, by dostarczać organizacjom gotowe do działania rekomendacje.

Techminds Revolution to zespół ekspertów łączących wiedzę z zakresu data science, automatyzacji i branżowej praktyki. Nasze rozwiązania są tworzone z myślą o skalowalności i integracji z istniejącą infrastrukturą klienta – niezależnie od wielkości firmy. Współpracujemy z partnerami branżowymi i akceleratorami innowacji, by nie tylko odpowiadać na aktualne potrzeby rynku, ale i aktywnie go kształtować.

Name: UX Frenzy
Description:
At UX Frenzy, we don’t just design interfaces; we craft seamless, human-centric experiences that resonate and engage. As a leading UX design agency, our passion lies in turning complex challenges into intuitive solutions that empower both users and businesses.

Our holistic approach covers the entire spectrum of UX design. We start with deep user research and persona development to build a solid understanding of your audience. With user journey mapping, we illuminate the path users take, helping you spot opportunities and resolve pain points.

Our expertise in information architecture ensures that content flows effortlessly, while our wireframing and prototyping breathe life into ideas for meaningful feedback and rapid iteration. We specialize in interaction design and visual design that align with your brand identity, and we don’t stop there—we make sure everything is inclusive with our accessibility design services.

Micro-interactions add subtle, delightful touches to keep users engaged, and our responsive design ensures your products look flawless across devices. We also prioritize performance with usability testing, conversion rate optimization (CRO), and A/B testing to boost engagement and user satisfaction.

Our content strategy and UX writing enhance communication, making your products not just usable, but enjoyable. With tailored user onboarding and design systems, we help you scale seamlessly while maintaining consistency. Plus, our post-launch analysis ensures that every design evolves with data-driven improvements.

At UX Frenzy, we believe that great UX is the bridge between ideas and impact. Join us in designing experiences that aren’t just seen but felt. Ready to elevate your product? Let’s make it unforgettable.

Name: Abram Digital Consulting
Description:
Abram Digital is a strategic UI consulting firm that partners with cybersecurity companies to improve the usability, trust, and credibility of their digital products. We specialize in designing user interfaces that clearly communicate security, reduce user error, and increase product adoption in high-risk environments. 

We’re not a design agency, but instead choose to run our operation similar to that of a consulting company with high-level deliverables and proficiency.

In the cybersecurity space, a confusing or poorly designed interface can erode trust, increase operational risk, and create costly misunderstandings. Our team applies deep UI expertise to eliminate friction, align interfaces with user expectations, and translate complex security features into intuitive experiences.

We exist to help cybersecurity companies build products that users trust at first glance—because trust isn’t just about encryption; it’s about clarity, confidence, and the experience on the screen.

Companies We Work With
- Cybersecurity Companies with legacy technology and clunky interfaces with 5 to 10+ employees
- Government Entities with outdated technology, products, and clunky interfaces
- Cybersecurity Startups that have raised (or are seeking) funding
- Cybersecurity companies with at-capacity UI backlogs

We're veteran and minority-owned and founded.
Contact us for an expert UI assessment of your cybersecurity software.

✓ Hohe Spezialisierung: Wir arbeiten ausschließlich mit Shopware und kennen die Technologie in- und auswendig – vom Frontend über ERP-, PIM- und WMS-Integrationen bis hin zur Prozessautomatisierung.

✓ Multidisziplinäres Team: CREHLER vereint über 30 Expert:innen – Entwickler:innen, E-Commerce-Architekt:innen, Analyst:innen, UX/UI-Designer:innen und Projektmanager:innen – für ganzheitliche Betreuung von der Konzeption bis zur Weiterentwicklung.
✓ Partnerschaft statt Projekt: Wir begleiten unsere Kunden langfristig, beraten strategisch, optimieren und entwickeln ihre Vertriebssysteme im Takt ihres Geschäfts weiter.

Bei CREHLER glauben wir: Technologie darf nicht einschränken – sie muss Wachstum ermöglichen. Deshalb schaffen wir Lösungen, die nicht nur funktionieren, sondern echten Wettbewerbsvorteil bringen.

Name: Ecmd Tech
Description:
A EcMd Tech é uma empresa especializada em soluções tecnológicas para o setor hospitalar, com foco em eficiência operacional, automação e conectividade. Fundada em 2024, é liderada por Sidney Semedo, profissional com 35 anos de experiência nos mercados de dispositivos médicos, farmacêutico e equipamentos.

Nosso objetivo é aprimorar processos e resultados, oferecendo tecnologia e inteligência para otimizar a rotina dos profissionais de saúde, além de aprimorar a conectividade e automação dos serviços hospitalares. Acreditamos que a transformação digital é fundamental para elevar a qualidade e a eficiência do setor, por isso desenvolvemos soluções inovadoras que simplificam o dia a dia das organizações de saúde.

Nossas soluções:

 Sistema de Localização de Equipamentos: Permite aos profissionais de saúde e equipes técnicas localizar equipamentos em tempo real, garantindo rapidez e eficiência nos procedimentos.

 Inteligência Artificial Privativa: Criamos bases de IA personalizadas para empresas de saúde, com conteúdos controlados e customizados, permitindo consultas sobre produtos, medicamentos e equipamentos via chats conversacionais como o WhatsApp, de forma amigável e fácil de implementar.

 Conectividade & Automação: Integra sistemas hospitalares para garantir uma gestão mais fluida e eficiente, facilitando o acesso a dados e a comunicação entre as equipes de saúde.

 Programas de Marketing e Vendas: Desenvolvemos estratégias personalizadas para ajudar empresas do setor hospitalar a expandir sua presença no mercado e otimizar seus resultados comerciais.

Combinamos expertise técnica, conhecimento estratégico e inovação tecnológica para entregar resultados concretos para hospitais, clínicas e empresas do setor da saúde. Se sua organização busca otimizar operações, reduzir desperdícios e aprimorar processos, a EcMd Tech tem as soluções ideais para você.

Who Should Follow Us?
Cybersecurity Professionals, AI/ML Engineers, Data Scientists, Product Managers, Security Researchers, and CISOs seeking to build, deploy, and govern AI systems securely.

Name: Uplatz MetaVault
Description:
Uplatz MetaVault is an intelligent, cloud-native platform designed to centralize and govern application metadata across the enterprise landscape. In today’s complex IT ecosystems, organizations often struggle to maintain visibility into their diverse applications — from ownership and integrations to technology stacks and compliance requirements. MetaVault solves this challenge by acting as a single source of truth for all application-related information.

Built with scalability and automation at its core, MetaVault provides a unified repository that captures and organizes critical metadata such as application descriptions, business owners, hosting environments, dependencies, cloud providers, data classifications, and compliance attributes. This holistic approach enables IT, data, and compliance teams to gain 360° visibility and governance over every system in the organization.

MetaVault supports seamless discovery, cataloging, and governance of metadata through intuitive dashboards and smart search capabilities. It empowers enterprises to streamline audits, reduce redundancy, accelerate modernization initiatives, and ensure regulatory alignment across their technology portfolio.
With MetaVault, decision-makers can easily identify technology gaps, optimize investments, and strengthen compliance posture through actionable insights. Its secure, role-based access ensures that teams across business, IT, and security functions collaborate effectively while maintaining data confidentiality.

By transforming scattered and siloed metadata into structured intelligence, Uplatz MetaVault helps enterprises achieve operational transparency, governance efficiency, and digital confidence. Whether you are managing hundreds or thousands of applications, MetaVault provides the foundation for smarter, more connected, and well-governed digital ecosystems.

Name: DIGITPORTS Project Interreg Italy-Croatia
Description:
The DIGITPORTS project aims to boost the competitiveness of maritime transport through the use of digitalisation tools (Digital Twins - DT) to enhance planning capabilities, operational sustainability and performance of ports, creating a scalable DT logistic network in the Adriatic basin.

The DIGITPORTS project, by key points, focuses on helping port authorities to:
• achieve full digitalization of administrative and planning procedures
• contribute to the decarbonization of transport and a better use of resources
• adopt a common strategy to ensure a common quality and scalability of the ports' digital replication model (the so-called “Digital Twins”)
• strengthen cooperation in the field of digitalization, creating a cultural change with standard and interoperable quality requirements, setting as a medium-term (10 years) goal the full digitalization of port operations in the Adriatic area.

The DIGITPORTS partnership comprises 7 Port Authorities:

Lead Partner:
North Adriatic Sea Port System Authority (NASPA), ports of Venice and Chioggia - IT 
Project Partners:
Port Network Authority of the Eastern Adriatic Sea (PNAEAS), ports of Trieste and Monfalcone - IT
Port of Ravenna Authority (ADSPMACS) - IT
Port of Rijeka Authority (PRA) - HR
Port of Ploče Authority (PPA) - HR
Port of Zadar Authority (ZPA) - HR
Port of Split Authority (SPA) - HR

Associated Organization:
Central Adriatic Ports Authority (ADSPMAC), ports of Pesaro, Falconara Marittima, Ancona, S. Benedetto, Pescara, Ortona - IT

Name: iVinci
Description:
iVinci is an R&D company developing IoT sensors and software platforms. We develop customer-specific solutions for sensor hardware and software. A solution can be a hardware sensor, a communication node, the server software with data analysis (the 'iVinci Control Room') and a user-specific dashboard.

Our sensors measure water levels, vibrations, tilt, temperature, air pressure and light intensity. The systems in the field work autonomously and communicate 24×7 with our own servers. We can develop a suitable IoT sensor solution for many issues.

We work together with Utrecht University of Applied Sciences and Delft University of Technology for innovations and improvements. Every year we help interns and graduates to take steps in the field of sensor technology; both with regard to the hardware and the embedded software, the server software and the user interface. For production and operation, we work with selected partners, mainly in the Netherlands.

We monitor our systems through our iVinci Control Room and signal when support is needed. For example, if a sensor has become defective or the battery needs to be charged after a few years.

Name: VetMonitor ApS
Description:
VetMonitor is an innovative tool designed to streamline the documentation process for veterinarians. With the power of advanced AI technology, VetMonitor enables you to efficiently manage consultations, record audio, and generate drafts for journals or discharge letters.

You can create consultations of different types, tailored to your needs. During each consultation, you can record audio files to capture essential details. The recorded audio is automatically transcribed into text, providing you with a time-saving solution for documentation.

Once the transcription is complete, you can use it to generate either a draft journal or a discharge letter. These drafts are for your exclusive use and are never sent directly to pet owners. You maintain full control over the content, ensuring it meets your standards and complies with professional requirements.

After reviewing and editing the drafts, you can copy them into your existing journal system for seamless integration.

VetMonitor is built to reduce the administrative workload of veterinarians, enabling you to focus more on your patients. The app is strictly for professional use and does not provide medical advice to users or patients.

Atuamos principalmente com o sistema WMS (Warehouse Management System), garantindo uma gestão de estoque eficiente e processos de armazenagem otimizados.

Nossa expertise inclui a implantação completa de sistemas WMS, desde elaboração de documentos técnico-funcionais, implantação e parametrização de sistemas WMS, capacitação de equipes operacionais, até o suporte contínuo, garantindo que seu time esteja capacitado para utilizar todas as funcionalidades. Além disso, trabalhamos com integração de sistemas (Banco de Dados, TXT, REST API) e infraestrutura em cloud (AWS), oferecendo também serviços com RFID e Radiofrequência, para garantir que a tecnologia trabalhe ao máximo a favor do seu negócio.

Principais diferenciais:

-Consultoria especializada em WMS e infraestrutura (AWS, RFID, Radio Frequência).
-Gestão completa do ciclo de implantação de sistemas, desde instalação e parametrização até o suporte pós-implantação.
-Análise e otimização de performance operacional, proporcionando agilidade e resultados mensuráveis.
-Suporte contínuo e capacitação das equipes.
-Projetos realizados em empresas líderes nos setores de e-commerce, cosméticos, gestão de marcas, varejo, logística e transporte, proporcionando soluções personalizadas em WMS e otimização de processos operacionais.
Esses são apenas alguns dos projetos que destacam nossa experiência e compromisso com o sucesso de nossos clientes.

Com uma abordagem centrada na eficiência e na melhoria contínua, nossa missão é simplificar processos, aumentar a produtividade e entregar resultados tangíveis para nossos clientes.

Vamos transformar sua operação logística? Entre em contato e descubra como podemos conectar seu futuro digital.

Nossa abordagem baseada em IA é fundamentada na inovação e na busca contínua por soluções eficazes e intuitivas. Estamos comprometidos em tornar a nutrição acessível a todos, promovendo a educação, a praticidade e a confiança em cada interação.
A transparência é um pilar essencial da Ainutri. Buscamos construir relacionamentos sólidos e genuínos com nossos usuários, fornecendo informações confiáveis e promovendo uma compreensão mais profunda sobre escolhas alimentares saudáveis e seus impactos positivos na vida diária.

Na AI Nutri, acreditamos que a tecnologia aliada à expertise de um nutricionista baseado em IA pode revolucionar a maneira como as pessoas cuidam de si mesmas. Estamos comprometidos em ser a ponte entre a nutrição inteligente e a jornada de bem-estar de cada indivíduo, capacitando-os a viverem vidas mais saudáveis e vibrantes!

Name: HUMNS
Description:
HUMNS | For those figuring out what comes after "doing."

1. The Shift
The future isn’t just about AI or automation.
It’s about us,  the people, learning how to exist when “doing” is no longer the only way to matter.

For decades, we measured worth by output, money earned, things produced, hours logged. We called it progress. But in trading meaning for metrics, we quietly sidelined the deeper parts of being human.

2. The Question
As automation quietly takes over the work that once structured our days, many are left trying to find rhythm again.
Not “Who are we?” but how do we exist when the frameworks that told us what to do stop working?

3. The Space
HUMNS exists for that question. It’s not an answer. It’s a space.

A place to be seen in the transition, to talk honestly about uncertainty, belonging, and what it means to build a future that still includes us.

4. The Approach
We don’t preach optimism. We make things visible.
We don’t offer solutions. We surface understanding.

Through conversation, research, and the HUMNS Podcast,
We’re documenting what’s changing, not in technology, but in people.

5. The Intent
It’s about transcending old definitions, discovering what human potential becomes when work’s meaning is rewritten.
HUMNS is the space where we explore that together, through honest conversations about the shift.

Welcome if you're still figuring it out.

Join the conversation on YouTube & X
https://x.com/HUMNSiP
https://www.youtube.com/@HUMNScode

In de hedendaagse maatschappij speelt design een belangrijke rol. Hoe je als bedrijf overkomt op je doelgroep en hoe je inspeelt op hun behoeften zegt alles over of ze met jou in zee gaan of niet. Er wordt vaak alleen rekening gehouden met of iets mooi is, terwijl dit nogal subjectief is. Het is onze missie om je meer dan dat te geven. Een mooi design valt of staat met een heldere positionering. 

Als jij niet kan vertellen voor wie je er bent en wat jouw bedrijf doet, hoe moeten potentiële klanten dan de keuze maken om met jou samen te werken?

Name: Touch Software House
Description:
Somos uma empresa de software e uma parceira para a elaboração, desenvolvimento, projeto, implantação e manutenção de soluções personalizadas para os nossos clientes.

Nossa atuação no mercado se fundamenta em soluções baseadas no aprimoramento e utilização de tecnologias e ferramentas para atingir objetivos que primem por eficiência, segurança, confiabilidade e flexibilidade, sempre considerando o contexto personalíssimo da solução para o cliente. Essa perspectiva requer tempo, esforço e uma orientação persistente de envolvimento com o negócio que demanda nossa participação. 

Nossos mais de 20 anos de atuação diária nos deram maturidade para compreender nossa posição mercadológica e aprofundar os conhecimentos que deram mais lastro e mais profundidade para os projetos que participamos. Nosso lema é “encurtar caminhos”. Não acreditamos que destruir legados seja o primeiro passo para criação de um cenário inovador.  Ao contrário, achamos que as melhores soluções nascem da melhor combinação de recursos, prazos e custos possíveis para o contexto de aplicação e que o espírito na inovação se estabelece de forma branda, gradual, sólida e permanente através da melhoria contínua dos processos que integram uma solução.

Por vezes, muitas parcerias precisam ser estabelecidas para que possamos oferecer uma solução final adequada às expectativas estabelecidas. Mas, para a Touch, a primeira e grande parceria que deve ser estabelecida é com seus clientes. Somente propósitos comuns estabelecem laços suficientemente fortes para manter todos os envolvidos focados, obstinados e dispostos a superar desafios.

Name: Professionele Websites, Webshops & SEO voor drukke ondernemers | Webbouwer Amore
Description:
Bij Webouwer Amore helpen we vrouwelijke ondernemers met het bouwen van professionele websites die hun visie en missie weerspiegelen. Sinds 2020 zorgen we ervoor dat jij je kunt focussen op je bedrijf, terwijl wij de technische zorgen van je website uit handen nemen.

Onze Diensten:
 Maatwerk Websites: We bouwen websites die volledig passen bij jouw huistijl en visie. Heb je moeite met het design? Geen probleem, we helpen je graag met het creëren van een unieke look voor je site.

 Converterende Websites: Een mooie website is belangrijk, maar een website die ook klanten aantrekt is essentieel. Wij zorgen voor een site die jouw bedrijf goed positioneert en zorgt voor conversie.

 Volledige Websitebouw: Van de homepage tot de contactpagina, wij bouwen alle noodzakelijke pagina's voor jouw website en zorgen ervoor dat alles werkt zoals het hoort.

 Responsieve Design: Je website ziet er op mobiel, tablet én desktop fantastisch uit, zodat jij je geen zorgen hoeft te maken over verschillende apparaten.

 Integraties: Of het nu gaat om je favoriete e-mailmarketingtool of online afsprakenplanner (zoals Calendly), wij zorgen ervoor dat alles naadloos gekoppeld wordt aan je website.

 SEO (Zoekmachineoptimalisatie): Wij optimaliseren je website zodat deze beter vindbaar is in zoekmachines, zodat je de juiste klanten aantrekt die bij jou passen.

Waarom Webouwer Amore? Bij Webouwer Amore gaat het niet alleen om technische kennis, maar ook om het bieden van een zorgeloze ervaring. We zorgen ervoor dat je website gebruiksvriendelijk is en precies doet wat jij nodig hebt om te groeien.

Onze Missie: We helpen vrouwelijke ondernemers die hun bedrijf willen laten groeien, maar geen technische kennis of tijd hebben om zelf een website te bouwen. Met onze expertise maken we de weg vrij voor online succes.

Wil je meer weten of een website laten bouwen die écht werkt voor jouw bedrijf? Neem contact met ons op via DM, e-mail of onze website.

Name: MindSync Analytics
Description:
A MindSync é uma HealthTech nascida na Cidade do Recife com o propósito de inclusão. Por meio da união de tecnologia, saúde e inovação, desenvolvemos o TEA Vision, uma ferramenta que auxilia pediatras e neuropediatras na identificação de sinais de autismo em crianças de 1 a 3 anos de idade, facilitando e acelerando o diagnóstico precoce de autismo. 

Tudo isso é possível por meio da tecnologia de EyeTracking (rastreamento ocular), onde por meio do comportamento visual da criança ao assistir vídeos e interações, nossa inteligência artificial permite identificar aquelas que apresentem sinais ligadas ao Transtorno do Espectro Autista (TEA).

Rápida, objetiva e fácil de usar, nossa ferramenta auxilia o profissional médico no seu dia-dia, adaptando-se a sua rotina, trazendo mais evidência e assertividade na realização do diagnóstico precoce de TEA. 

Ao promover o diagnóstico precoce de autismo, habilitamos que essa criança tenha também acesso ao tratamento precoce, minimizando os sintomas do autismo e permitindo que essa seja incluída e possa realizar os seus sonhos!

----------------------------------------

Nossa história:

A MindSync nasceu em Janeiro de 2024 buscando promover inovação em saúde mental. Em seus meses iniciais, após compreender mais amplamente o contexto do autismo no Brasil, vimos que poderíamos unir tecnologia e inovação á saúde para desenvolver soluções de impacto.

Inicialmente fomos pré-incubados no PoloTec (Polo Tecnológico e Criativo da UFPE) por 6 meses, onde realizamos o desenvolvimento inicial de entendimento do problema e da solução.

Atualmente nossa Startup está incubada no InovaHC (maior Hub de inovação em saúde da América Latina, sediado na cidade de São Paulo) desde de Setembro de 2024, onde estamos aprofundando nossos processos de inovação anteriores e construindo nosso Modelo de Negócios e MVP.

Name: Trança.me
Description:
Trança.me é uma beautytech inovadora que empodera trancistas e profissionais da beleza. O aplicativo conecta talentos a clientes, simplificando a gestão de negócios e impulsionando o crescimento de empreendedores no setor de beleza por meio de soluções tecnológicas.

 O que oferecemos?

Agenda inteligente: Organize horários com lembretes automáticos e confirmações simplificadas.

Gestão financeira simplificada: Acompanhe faturamento e tenha controle total das finanças.

Divulgação eficaz: Compartilhe sua agenda nas redes sociais e seja facilmente encontrado por novos clientes via geolocalização.

A missão do Trança.me é tornar o empreendedorismo acessível e sem complicações. Com poucos passos, os profissionais podem iniciar seus negócios, divulgar seus serviços e atrair clientes próximos.

 Para quem?

Embora criado para trancistas, o Trança.me também atende outros profissionais da beleza, como:

 - Barbeiros
 - Cabeleireiros
 - Designers de sobrancelhas
 - Esteticistas
 - Manicures / Nails Designers
 - Maquiadores(as)
 - Dreadmakers

 Por que somos diferentes?

O Trança.me foi desenvolvido com base nas reais necessidades dos profissionais da beleza. Insights coletados diretamente com trancistas foram fundamentais para criar ferramentas que automatizam questionários e processos antes do agendamento. Dessa forma, todas as informações importantes dos clientes são recebidas com antecedência, permitindo que o profissional se concentre no que realmente importa: encantar com sua arte.

 Nossa visão

Empoderar profissionais da beleza para que possam crescer, conquistar novos clientes e profissionalizar seus negócios. Estamos criando um ecossistema onde talentos se transformam em negócios de sucesso, tornando o processo de empreender simples, acessível e gratificante.

 Trança.me: leve sua arte além.

#EmpreendedorismoNaBeleza #TecnologiaParaTrancistas #TransformeSeuNegócio #TrançaMe #Tranças #Trancista

Name: JASSWAYPOS
Description:
Shenzhen Jassway Infotech Co., Ltd --- Leading professional manufacturer and service provider in touch POS industry

Shenzhen Jassway Infotech Co., Ltd is a high-tech enterprise engaged in R&D, production, sales and services of touch POS products. Jassway was established in 2014, it has a strong R&D team and its total number of employees is between 40-60. Meanwhile, it has 3000 square metres of standard workshop and advanced automated production equipment in Shenzhen. It has been a leading professional manufacturer and service provider in touch POS industry.


Jassway is the main provider and exporter of large-size touch POS products in China, its products has been exported to 60 countries and areas, and its clients are widely spreaded in the retail and the hospitality industries. Now Jassway has gained high reputation in European and American markets, and the complete marketing channel and service system has been established.


"Honesty, responsibility, gratitude"is Jassway's corporate core value, stressing that the enterprise must be honest in business, should be responsible for customers and worker staff, has to be grateful to the society, Jassway's core value is the basis of it's survival and development.

With full product lines in Self-checkout, Touch POS, Touch Screen, Kiosk, PC BOX and peripherals, our products have been used widely in retail, F&B, telecom, entertainment, healthcare and so on.

JASSWAY is equipped with QA test laboratory, burn-in test room and strict inspection processes for all products. We strive to supply quality products and give top priority to customers' trust.

Adhering to the spirits of “Honesty, Dedication, Innovation, Win-win”, JASSWAY continues to spare no effort in serving customers, motivating employees' potential and making great contribution to society.

Name: DesignHub IT
Description:
Most SaaS products fail to scale because of poor UX decisions. Confusing user journeys, unclear value
communication, and inconsistent design systems. When usability suffers, conversion rates drop, reducing
conversions and brand trust. A great interface doesn’t just attract users. It converts them, retains them, 
and keeps them coming back.

I’m Abdul Hakim, a skilled UI/UX designer. I’ve crafted over 700+ global projects and worked with SaaS 
companies to transform complex products into simple, conversion-focused, user-friendly experiences. 
My approach combines UX research, information architecture, user journey mapping, and high-fidelity UI design to ensure increased conversions, improved retention, and build products people actually want to use. 

 My core strengths:

SaaS Product Strategy → designing for clarity, conversion, and retention
UX Research → understanding real user behavior through insights and testing
Wireframing & Prototyping → turning ideas into interactive, testable product flows
UI/UX Design → building scalable, intuitive interfaces for SaaS platforms

 My Design Process:

→ Research & Requirement Gathering
→ Define User Flow & Information Architecture
→ Create Wireframes & Visual Concepts
→ Design High-Fidelity Screens in Figma
→ Deliver Interactive Prototype & Developer Handoff

If your SaaS product needs a stronger UX foundation, a modern redesign, or a complete
user experience strategy that drives retention and revenue. Let’s connect. I help SaaS teams
transform design into a measurable growth asset.

best regards,
Md Abdul Hakim

Name: UDrive
Description:
UDrive (Uncertainty Drive) brings uncertainty-aware AI to autonomous driving. Our Epistemic AI platform quantifies what a system doesn’t know and uses it to make safer, more reliable decisions. By unifying perception and end-to-end planning that reason about uncertainty in real time, UDrive helps vehicles recognise unusual objects and navigate difficult conditions—from rare edge cases to poor weather—with calibrated confidence. We partner with OEMs, AV technology providers, and fleet operators to enhance safety, robustness, and operational efficiency.

Born from the H2020 FET-Open “Epistemic AI” project led by Prof. Fabio Cuzzolin at Oxford Brookes University, UDrive is developed in collaboration with Delft University of Technology and industry partners Indeep AI and Leo Drive, translating cutting-edge research into market-ready capability.

Name: Модульные строительные системы
Description:
Мы являемся международной компанией инженерно-технического проектирования с большим собственным центром опытно-конструкторских разработок и многочисленным штатом инженеров.

Наша команда проектирует платформу, объединяющую ряд сервисов, которая автоматизирует сложные механизмы строительства и пользования недвижимостью.

Мы имеем собственные производственные мощности и разрабатываем сложную систему, которая позволит нашим заводам максимально автоматизировать процесс производства деталей для модульных домов благодаря координации методологии их сборки.

В процессе разработки технологии производства домов мы запатентовали около 20 инженерных решений, а также широко применяем принципы бережливого производства на заводах и строительной площадке.

Мы изготавливаем сборочные комплекты, которые порциями отправляются на участок точно под каждый этап сборки дома. Это обеспечивает более низкие затраты, более быструю поставку, меньше отходов и углерода, высокое качество и повторяемые результаты, безопасные условия труда. Вот почему мы говорим, что производим дома, а не строим их.

Wij kunnen dit oppakken om samen de behoefte te bepalen en kwalitatief goede engineers in te zetten eventueel door middel van een aangepast trainingsprogramma. Wij denken graag mee om efficiënt en projecten met hoge kwaliteit op te leveren. Voor ons is een goed partnership daarbij altijd het uitgangspunt!

Connect-SU is de offshore partner op gebied van technisch tekenwerk. 
Wij hebben specialisten in verschillende vakgebieden met name op gebied van het ontwerpen van ondergrondse netwerken (telecom/FTTH). Dit doen wij nu al 2 jaren succesvol met verschillende gerenommeerde partners in Nederland. Onze engineers hebben oog voor detail en een klantvriendelijke instelling. Ons team werkt volgens de methode afspraak is afspraak en het grote voordeel is dat zij de Nederlandse taal beheersen en deze ook uitstekend begrijpen. Zij zijn gewend met het werken onder tijdsdruk. Wij gaan graag met je in gesprek om kwalitatief een goed ontwerp te engineeren en zo werk uit handen te nemen met de juiste kwaliteit. 

Via onze website www.connect-su.nl nodig ik je uit voor meer informatie over ons en daarop vindt je ook onze contactgegevens om een afspraak met ons te maken.

Name: BlackForest-Sentinel
Description: Willkommen bei BlackForestSentinel! Wir sind ein junges und dynamisches Unternehmen, das im Jahr 2020 von zwei ambitionierten Studenten gegründet wurde. Unsere Vision ist es, regionale Anbieter für eine digitale, nachhaltige Zukunft zu wappnen. Wir möchten Einzelhändlern und Vereinen helfen, auch in Zukunft im Netz präsent zu sein und ihre Produkte und Dienstleistungen einer breiteren Öffentlichkeit zugänglich zu machen. Wir sind der Überzeugung, dass jedes Unternehmen und jeder Verein eine großartige Website verdient, um potenzielle Kunden und Unterstützer zu erreichen und das Geschäft oder die Organisation zu fördern. Wir wissen jedoch auch, dass die Erstellung einer professionellen Website für kleine Unternehmen und Vereine eine Herausforderung darstellen kann, insbesondere wenn finanzielle Mittel begrenzt sind. Deshalb bieten wir maßgeschneiderte Lösungen an, die auf Ihr Budget und Ihre spezifischen Anforderungen zugeschnitten sind. Dabei legen wir großen Wert auf eine enge Abstimmung zwischen unseren Entwicklern und der ästhetischen sowie funktionalen Gestaltung Ihrer Marke, um Ihre Botschaft effektiv zu kommunizieren. Dabei bleibt immer im Fokus, dass die Kosten für Sie erschwinglich bleiben.

Name: HISP Vietnam
Description:
HISP Vietnam, based in Ho Chi Minh City, is a member of the global Health Information Systems Programme (HISP) network, coordinated by the Department of Informatics at the University of Oslo. The organization specializes in the development, implementation, and support of health information management systems (HIMS) using the open-source, web-based DHIS2 platform.

HISP Vietnam has extensive experience supporting Ministries of Health and development partners across Southeast Asia and the Pacific. Countries supported include Vietnam, Laos, Cambodia, Myanmar, Indonesia, and Pacific Island nations such as Tonga, Solomon Islands, and Vanuatu. Key partners include PSI and the World Health Organization (WHO).

The organization provides a range of services including:
 - Custom development and deployment of DHIS2-based HIMS
 - Capacity building and training for DHIS2 users
 - Technical support for data collection, analysis, and reporting
 - Research and innovation in digital health systems

HISP Vietnam is committed to strengthening health information systems, improving data quality and availability, and empowering evidence-based decision-making across the region through the use of DHIS2.

Name: A-book
Description:
a-book er et intelligent og brugervenligt bookingsystem
– skræddersyet til de danske kommuners administration af kultur- og idrætsanlæg.

Med vores seneste bookingløsning til aktiviteter, A-Book, bruger vi det menneskelige fra Umano i Contools stærke og gennemprøvede bookingmotor, og gør booking til en menneskelig proces. I samarbejde med Københavns Kommune har vi tilpasset løsningen til, at kunne håndtere Anlæg, Områder og Baner. Her har vi i første omgang haft fokus på den frie booking, og er nu gået i gang med de organiserede bookinger.
 

Fra tanke til handling

Da vi er en design virksomhed, med speciale i komplekse IT løsninger, er design, brugergrænseflade og den samlede brugeroplevelse tre vigtige nøgleord for vores løsninger. Her i huset udvikler vi alt selv, hvilket gør, at der ikke langt fra tanke til handling, og fra vores designere til vores udviklere. Vi er meget vellidte hos vores kunder, da vi altid efterlever det vi lover og hellere går en mil ekstra, for at opnå de bedste resultater.

Booking fra  A-Z

A-Book er et tidssvarende bookingsystem, som er lavet i samarbejde med Administratorerne, der til dagligt sidder med kundekontakten.

A-Book er en design stærk løsning, som konstant læner sig op ad tidens trend og tilpasser sig brugernes behov og medier.

A-Book opfylder nemt alle jeres behov og sparer jer en masse kostbar tid i en travl hverdag.

Name: xflow - AI flow Messenger
Description:
Every hour you make dozens of decisions: who to put off, who to write to now, and what exactly to text. In our time, this cognitive load is growing everywhere.

Over 4 years of R&D — we created the logic that makes these constant choices for you. Dozens of AI agents continuously determine the most important contact to send a message to right now, and xflow messenger always keeps it in Live Activity with a ready-made message. All you have to do is review, edit if needed, and send. Then the system shows the next priority chat.

You never miss anything and always do what matters most — what leads to your goals fastest — without distractions from the outdated chat list.

We're not creating another cloud service or layer over existing IaaS. Our goal is to democratize software development, making it accessible and manageable for anyone with an idea, regardless of their technical background.

Name: johnny10.com
Description:
Projektuję i wdrażam responsywne strony www oraz sklepy internetowe kompleksowo. Podczas procesu projektowania zwracam szczególną uwagę na użyteczność oraz funkcjonalność witryn. Istotna jest nawigacja, interaktywność, jak również architektura informacji. Zapewniam także synergię zawartości, czyli spójność tekstów, elementów audio, video, zdjęć.

Kreuję świadomości marki. Najistotniejsze dla marki jest logo, oraz slogany reklamowe. Ważne jest aby w każdym komunikacie powyższe elementy były spójne, dzięki czemu skutecznie trafią do podświadomości klienta. Dlatego kluczowa jest identyfikacja wizualna, czyli przemyślane wzory wyglądu oraz prezentacji przy przekazie reklamowym.

Projektuję i przygotowuję materiały do technik poligrafii dla drukarni. To projekty na różnorodne nośniki reklamowe, za pomocą których można promować firmę, markę lub wydarzenie. DTP to pochodna procesu identyfikacji wizualnej, czyli druk wizytówek, katalogów, banerów, jak również kompozycji logo na materiałach reklamowych.

Tworzę efektywne wizualnie projekty graficzne do stron www oraz sklepów internetowych. Projektując zwracam uwagę na minimalizm formy, czytelność, a także gradację informacji. Stosuję zasady równowagi oraz proporcji, aby odbiorca płynnie poruszał się po obrazie. Dobieram kolorystykę, krój pisma aby wzbudzić emocje, w celu realizacji założeń.

Marketing internetowy to działania mające na celu zwiększenie widoczności marki w Internecie. Przy pomocy najczęściej używanego narzędzia, którym jest firmowa strona internetowa, strona www projektu, usługi lub produktu. Najpopularniejsze stosowane działania to organiczne: pozycjonowanie organiczne stron www, oraz kampanie Google Ads.

Reklama w social mediach jest istotnym czynnikiem zwiększającym interakcję klienta z firmą. Oferuję administrację i kampanie na profilach w serwisach społecznościowych. Za pośrednictwem Social Mediów (Facebook, Instagram, Pinterest) można docierać do nowych klientów, oraz spajać ze sobą obecnych.

شرکت "وب رنوا" یک شرکت فعال در زمینه دیجیتال مارکتینگ و طراحی وب است. این شرکت در دنیای اینترنت و تکنولوژی به عنوان یکی از شرکتهای فعال در این حوزه شناخته میشود. فعالیتهای اصلی این شرکت شامل طراحی و توسعه وبسایتها، بهینهسازی موتورهای جستجو (SEO)، مدیریت تبلیغات آنلاین و تبلیغات اجتماعی، تحلیل دادههای دیجیتال، ایجاد استراتژیهای بازاریابی دیجیتال و ارائه خدمات مشاوره در حوزه دیجیتال مارکتینگ به مشتریان متنوع از کسب و کارها است.

وبسایتهایی که توسط "وب رنوا" طراحی میشوند، دارای طراحیهای جذاب و کاربرپسندی هستند و با رعایت استانداردهای امنیتی و سرعت بالا ارائه میشوند. این شرکت تیم ماهری از متخصصان در زمینه طراحی و توسعه وب دارد که تلاش میکنند تا بهترین راهکارهای دیجیتالی را برای مشتریان خود ارائه دهند و به آنها کمک کنند تا در دنیای آنلاین موفق شوند. "وب رنوا" با توجه به تخصص و تجربه خود، به عنوان یک شریک قابل اعتماد برای کسب و کارها در توسعه حضور آنلاین و افزایش تبلیغاتی و فروش از طریق اینترنت شناخته میشود.

 What We Offer:

Join us on our journey to revolutionize communication!

Name: BID - TECNOLOGIA E INOVAÇÃO
Description:
A BID TECNOLOGIA atua no segmento de logística reversa, compra e venda equipamentos tecnológicos diversos. Fazemos oferta nos materiais que compõem excesso de inventário ou que são oriundos de RMA ou NCM. Entregamos, caso necessário, um processo de descaracterização e higienização de dados. Temos estrutura própria, fazemos a retirada dos materiais, emitimos laudo da destinação de acordo com a Política Nacional de Resíduos Sólidos (Lei número 12.305, de 2010). Possuímos licenças ambientais e certificações dos órgãos governamentais como CETESB e IBAMA e emitimos relatórios bem como certificados ao final do processo. Seu parque tecnológico em desuso ou inativo ocupando espaço fisico? Oferecemos soluções para equipamentos obsoletos da sua empresa, seja recondicionando para retornar ao mercado, seja descaracterizando resíduos para retornar à indústria. 

Com os desafios contemporâneos de preservação do meio ambiente, atuamos de acordo com os princípios do ESG - Sustentabilidade Ambiental, Social e de Governança Corporativa, e fortalecemos o vínculo da sua marca no que tange a sigla E, promovendo uma atitude de redução do impacto da sua empresa no ambiente natural, através da destinação correta de equipamentos tecnológicos. O Programa Recicla Tecnologia nasce no bojo da necessidade de prevenção e redução na geração de resíduos, tendo como proposta a prática de hábitos de consumo sustentável e um conjunto de instrumentos para propiciar o aumento da reciclagem e da reutilização dos resíduos sólidos (aquilo que tem valor econômico e pode ser reciclado ou reaproveitado) e a sua correta destinação. Para tanto elaboramos alguns projetos onde sua empresa poderá se tornar parceira. Entre em contato!

Description:
Ki-Trade HUB: Ihre Cloud-native Lösung für den Vertrieb maßgefertigter Produkte

Ki-Trade HUB ist eine fortschrittliche, cloudbasierte Softwarelösung und ein leistungsfähiger 3D-Produktkonfigurator für den Vertrieb maßgefertigter Produkte. Unser 3D-Konfigurator ermöglicht die Echtzeit Konfiguration jedes Produkts nach individuellen Anforderungen, was den Vertriebsprozess konfigurierbarer Produkte erheblich vereinfacht. Die Ki-Trade HUB Software ist in den Versionen B2B, B2B2C und B2C verfügbar und bietet damit umfassende Flexibilität.

Durch unsere RESTful API können Daten aus dem 3D-Konfigurator nahtlos automatisiert und autonom importiert sowie exportiert werden. Doch Ki-Trade HUB ist mehr als nur ein 3D-Produktkonfigurator: Es handelt sich um eine integrierte Marketing-, Sales- und Service-Plattform. Diese unterstützt Vertriebsteams dabei, die Abschlussraten zu erhöhen, Kundenbeziehungen zu stärken und ihre Vertriebspipelines effizient zu verwalten.

Unsere vollautomatisierten Marketing-Tools ermöglichen die gezielte Ansprache von Zielgruppen und die effiziente Konversion von Leads zu Kunden. Die Sales-Tools optimieren den Verkaufsprozess und das Pipeline-Management, während die Service-Tools flexiblen Support bieten und die Kundenbeziehungen vertiefen.

Mit der Ki-Trade HUB Software beschleunigen Sie Ihr Wachstum im E-Commerce. Unabhängig davon, ob Sie mehr Leads generieren, Ihre Vertriebsprozesse optimieren, Ihre CRM-Datenbanken organisieren oder ein verbessertes Kundenerlebnis bieten möchten – Ki-Trade HUB ist die ideale Softwarelösung für Ihr Unternehmenswachstum. Starten Sie jetzt durch mit Ki-Trade HUB und heben Sie Ihr Geschäft auf die nächste Ebene!

Name: Ci
Description:
Colaboração (do Latim com "com" + laborare "trabalhar") é o processo em que duas ou mais pessoas, entidades ou organizações trabalham juntas para completar uma tarefa ou atingir um objetivo. Já a palavra inteligente, provém de intelligere, termo composto por intus (entre) e legere, que significa escolher ou ler. Ser inteligente é, assim, saber escolher a melhor alternativa entre várias, mas também saber sobre determinado assunto.
Nosso assunto, nosso foco é Tecnologia em Saúde. E saúde é gente, é relação humana, é interdependência. Não existe cultura organizacional sólida que sustente transformações se não entendermos como as pessoas se comportam neste contexto.
A Ci quer colaborar, trabalhar junto, entender e desenvolver as pessoas, as estratégias, os processos. Trazer foco, eficiência, qualidade e valor à instituição.

Softwarekonzepte, die Nutzer und Entwickler begeistern, sind meine Leidenschaft.
