Denn wirklich gute Software entsteht, wenn UX und Entwicklung eng miteinander zusammenarbeiten.

Dabei unterstütze ich insbesondere Projekte für Webapplikationen aus den Bereichen Industrie und Technologie, z.B. Dashboards, Anwendungen aus IoT und Industrie 4.0, oder aus Beratung und Verwaltung, z.B. Eventmanagement, Leadmanagement.

_________________________________________

Mit über acht Jahren Erfahrung in den Bereichen UX und Frontendentwicklung sowie mehr als 10 Jahren Erfahrung im UI-Design biete ich meinen Kunden ganz besondere Dienstleistungen aus der Schnittmenge dieser Bereiche.

Durch meine Laufbahn zieht sich die Arbeit an der Schnittstelle von Entwicklung und UX wie ein roter Faden. Heute liegt mein Fokus darauf, UX-Prozesse so zu gestalten, dass Nutzer und Entwickler optimal eingebunden werden.

 Ich liebe es, mich in Webapplikationen aus Industrie und Technik einzuarbeiten.

Description:
JoQuiz هو موقع إلكتروني تعليمي مختص في تقديم مصادر التعليم المجاني من الامتحانات الإلكترونية "المحوسبة" و أسئلة السنوات السابقة والمكثفات لطلاب الثانوية العامة (التوجيهي) في الأردن؛ علاوة على ذلك نقدم النشرات الاخبارية التعليمية بالإضافة إلى المقالات عن التعليم والحلول التعليمية.

تأسس جوكويز في مارس 2023، في العاصمة الأردنية عمان.

الخطوة القادمة:

نحن نسعى جاهدين لتحقيق رؤيتنا في وضع جميع موارد التعليم المدرسي لكافة المراحل التعليمية على منصة جوكويز، وذلك بهدف توفير بيئة تعليمية شاملة ومتكاملة للطلاب. وبعد ذلك، نهدف إلى التوسع لتغطية كافة التخصصات الجامعية، لنكون الوجهة الأولى للطلاب والمهتمين بالتعلم في مختلف المجالات الأكاديمية على مستوى المملكة.

الرؤية

نرى في JoQuiz مستقبلًا يُمكن لكل طالب فيه تحقيق إمكاناته الكاملة، بغض النظر عن خلفيته أو موقعه الجغرافي. نسعى جاهدين لجعل JoQuiz المنصة الرائدة للتعلم الإلكتروني التي تُوفر للطلاب أفضل الموارد وأكثرها فعالية لمساعدتهم على تعزيز مهاراتهم وتحسين أدائهم في الامتحانات الرسمية.

نؤمن بأن التعليم هو مفتاح النجاح في الحياة، ونهدف إلى جعل التعليم في متناول الجميع من خلال توفير منصة مجانية تمامًا وسهلة الاستخدام. نتعاون مع أفضل المعلمين والخبراء في المجال التعليمي لتطوير محتوى تعليمي عالي الجودة يلبي احتياجات الطلاب المختلفة.

نُدرك في JoQuiz أهمية التكنولوجيا في التعليم، ونستخدم أحدث التقنيات لتقديم تجربة تعليمية تفاعلية وجذابة. نُطور باستمرار منصتنا JoQuiz لتوفير ميزات جديدة تُساعد الطلاب على التعلم بشكل أكثر فعالية.

نُؤمن بأهمية المجتمع في التعلم، ونُشجع الطلاب على التواصل مع بعضهم البعض ومشاركة خبراتهم. نُقدم منتديات ومجموعات نقاش تُتيح للطلاب التفاعل مع بعضهم البعض ومع المعلمين والخبراء.

نُؤمن بأن كل طالب لديه القدرة على النجاح، ونُقدم الدعم والتشجيع الذي يحتاجه الطلاب لتحقيق أهدافهم. نُقدم خدمات إرشاد وتوجيه تُساعد الطلاب على اختيار المسار التعليمي المناسب لهم.

نُؤمن بأن التعليم هو حق للجميع، ونَسعى إلى جعل التعليم في متناول الجميع بغض النظر عن خلفيتهم أو موقعهم الجغرافي.

مع JoQuiz، يمكن لكل طالب تحقيق العلامة الكاملة.

Name: ShivAI Technologies
Description: ShivAI Technologies is an applied AI/ops studio focused on bringing clarity to LPG supply chains. We start where accuracy matters most- inventory in the yard, using handheld scanning, operator-assist prompts, and a standardized five-step SOP to produce dependable counts under real lighting, occlusion, and layout constraints. This counting-first approach lays the groundwork for full traceability: an engraved-serial OCR architecture that assigns each cylinder a durable identity and records events from plant line to distributor yard to last-mile return, creating an audit-ready chain of custody. Designed to fit existing operations, ShivAI connects with dispatch and GPS telemetry, surfaces actionable KPIs (TAT, stock-outs, shrinkage), and reduces reconciliation disputes so teams can plan confidently, operate safely, and scale efficiently.

Name: maketier
Description:
At Maketier, we build bespoke AI agent workflows that automate core business processes, remove busywork, and unlock scalable growth. Rather than one-size-fits-all automation, we map your operations, design purpose-built agents, and deploy production-ready workflows that integrate with the tools you already use — Shopify, Wix Studio, Airtable, CRMs, calendars, and docs.

Our offerings include three focused tiers: Social Media AI (automated content, A/B testing, posting & performance), Lead AI (capture, scoring, and personalised outreach), and Custom AI (end-to-end automations for proposals, billing, fulfilment and ops). 

Each engagement follows a proven Audit → Build → Deploy process: fast AI readiness checks, iterative agent development with human-in-the-loop validation, and monitored rollouts that measure ROI from day one.

We combine technical rigor with creative strategy so automation delivers measurable outcomes — fewer manual hours, faster delivery, better conversion rates, and lower operating costs. For teams that want to scale without hiring headcount, Maketier becomes your in-house AI partner: training, documentation, and continuous optimisation included.

Book an AI readiness audit to discover high-impact wins and receive a complimentary agent workflow with your first paid project.

Trust the Tier — where AI, strategy, and growth converge.

Description:
Chez Veem Labs, nous explorons de nouvelles manières d’améliorer la sécurité, l’efficacité et l’accessibilité de l’intelligence artificielle pour les chercheurs.

Parmi nos initiatives figurent des frameworks ainsi que des compilateurs novateurs. Ces derniers fonctionnent directement sur le matériel, ce qui leur permet d’optimiser considérablement les performances. Nous concevons des outils de prototypage accéléré pour l’expérimentation de structures inédites et la découverte de nouveaux horizons. La sécurité et l’alignement de l’IA avec les valeurs humaines sont au cœur de toutes nos décisions.

Nous visons à ériger les bases d’une IA digne de confiance en maîtrisant l’ensemble de la pile technique, du GPU jusqu’aux modèles. Nous partageons des recherches de pointe et développons des outils libres qui soutiennent la communauté scientifique, avec un intérêt particulier pour les applications à fort impact dans le domaine de la santé.

Name: Veem Labs
Description:
Chez Veem Labs, nous explorons de nouvelles manières de rendre l’intelligence artificielle plus sécuritaire, plus efficace et plus facile d’accès pour les chercheurs.
 
Nos projets incluent des framework légers et des compilateurs expérimentaux conçus pour accélérer le prototypage d’idées et ouvrir la voie à de nouvelles découvertes, tout en gardant à l’esprit la création de modèles de sécurité pour notre société et notre humanité.
 
Notre objectif : édifier les bases d’une IA fiable, publier des recherches de pointe et développer des outils ouverts qui soutiennent la communauté scientifique et favorisent des applications à fort impact, notamment dans le domaine de la santé.

Name: RICHWRD Studio
Description:
RICHWRD Studio is a Software Engineering consultancy focused on structural quality and longevity.

In a market saturated by unsupervised AI-generated code, we swim against the tide: we do not allow fragile solutions in production. Tools accelerate, but only solid engineering ensures business sustainability.

We design and develop solutions that withstand scale, failure, and change.

Our Core Pillars:

 Architecture & Blueprint: We translate requirements into technical strategy. We model the system ensuring performance fidelity and define the ideal topology — from Modular Monoliths to Microservices — focusing on modularization and ownership.

 Software Engineering & Code Quality: Code is a long-term asset. We apply Clean Architecture and SOLID to ensure low coupling and fight the technical debt of superficial automations, ensuring an auditible codebase.

 Cloud Infrastructure & Open-Source: We build agnostic and resilient infrastructures on Linux and Cloud (OCI/AWS). Our approach prioritizes strategic Open-Source to eliminate vendor lock-in and proprietary licensing costs, delivering enterprise performance.
• Orchestration: Kubernetes, Rancher, and Docker.
• Connectivity: Low-latency, secure Mesh VPN (Wireguard).
• Resilience: Load Balancers for real High Availability.

 Database Reliability Engineering: Deep expertise in PostgreSQL. We preserve logic within the application while optimizing persistence via Query Analysis and Execution Plan Tuning. We shield operations with governance (RBAC) and High Availability (HA) architectures.

At RICHWRD Studio, we deliver systems designed to last and perform.

Contact Us:  contact@richwrd.dev

Name: BACKLOGICA
Description:
Backlogica is a consulting practice dedicated to engineering clarity within complex digital ecosystems.

Backlogica designs structured, scalable Atlassian environments that turn configuration into comprehension and structure into strategy. What began as design-system thinking has evolved into a fully operational governance approach. One that treats Atlassian not as tools, but as living systems that must remain understandable over time.

At the core of this approach is BacklogOS, a system for operating backlogs with intent. Supported by governed subsystems such as GOVDOC, FieldTaxa720, StatusTaxa720, WebHookTaxa720, and AutoGuard. Together, these components establish traceability, semantic clarity, and operational memory across the operational core of a Jira instance.

This architecture enables Atlassian environments to become AI-ready and RAG-capable. Ready to be read, reasoned about, and safely acted upon by intelligent systems. Not through abstraction, but through disciplined governance that preserves meaning, intent, and context.

Backlogica’s advantage lies in BacklogOS. An operational system that allows humans and machines to understand work with equal precision. By bridging governance, workflow architecture, field taxonomy, and automation transparency, Backlogica creates ecosystems where data remains consistent, knowledge stays traceable, and decisions can be shared with confidence.

Originating from design-system roots in 1997 and formally established as Backlogica in 2018, the practice embodies nearly three decades of structured thinking and digital architecture expertise. Today, Backlogica stands as a benchmark for RAG-capable Atlassian governance proving that lasting clarity is never accidental, but the result of deliberate design and disciplined governance.

Nossa proposta é resolver a causa raiz desse problema unindo dois pilares que operam isolados no mercado:

O Resultado: A união desses pilares entrega um ecossistema comercial previsível. Onde antes existia caos de planilhas e "achismo", entregamos fluxos de trabalho eficientes, pipelines de vendas previsíveis e dashboards em tempo real que mostram o ROI de cada ação.

Nossa visão de longo prazo é clara: evoluir nossas soluções de consultoria para um SaaS de automações comerciais de escala corporativa.

Somos a Scalio. Integramos automação e tráfego para escalar vendas.

Name: Parcha.io
Description:
Data science-driven design is an approach to design that utilizes data science techniques and tools to inform and optimize the design process. The goal is to create designs that are not only aesthetically pleasing but also effective and efficient in meeting user needs and business objectives.

Data science-driven design involves the collection, analysis, and interpretation of data related to user behavior, preferences, and needs. This data is then used to inform design decisions, such as layout, color scheme, typography, and functionality. By analyzing data, designers can gain insights into how users interact with a product, identify areas for improvement, and make data-driven decisions to enhance the user experience.

Examples of data science-driven design in action include A/B testing, user surveys, heat mapping, and user behavior analytics. A/B testing involves testing two versions of a design to see which performs better with users. User surveys and interviews can provide valuable insights into user needs and preferences. Heat mapping can show which parts of a design users are interacting with the most. User behavior analytics can help identify patterns in user behavior and inform design decisions.

Name: Julian Arnold
Description:
Kennst Du das?

 Du benötigst professionelles UX/UI Design, hast aber keine internen Ressourcen, sodass das Potenzial Deiner App ungenutzt bleibt?

  Hast Du Fragen, weißt nicht weiter oder benötigst professionellen Support?

 Zu wenig Engagement?
Komplexität führt zu mangelndem User-Engagement und unerwünschten Ergebnissen?

 Frustrierende User-Journey?
Barrieren und fehlende Unterstützung bei der Nutzung Deiner App?

 Komplexe Bedienoberflächen?
Unattraktives, überladenes UI, ohne Struktur, dass Deine User:innen überfordert?

 Unbekannte User:innen?
Entscheidungen basierend auf Bauchgefühl, Vermutungen und internen Meinungen?

 Blindflug im Bereich UX/UI?
Unklare Ausrichtung auf alles außer eine Strategie und die Bedürfnisse Deiner User:innen?

---
Damit bist Du nicht allein, so geht es vielen Apps und Softwarelösungen da draußen.
---

 Nach unserer Zusammenarbeit, wirst Du Folgendes erreicht haben:

 Effektives UX/UI Design
Zielführende UX für Deine App und Softwarelösung. Deine Kund:innen und Stakeholder sind happy.

 Nahtlose End-2-End User-Journey
User-Journey von A bis Z durchdacht. Kein Platz mehr für Missverständnisse und Frustration.

 Benutzerfreundliches UI
Design, reduziert auf das Beste. Intuitive Navigation, barrierefrei, optimierte Inhalte.

 Handfeste Zielgruppen Insights
Design-Entscheidungen werden nutzerzentriert und datenbasiert getroffen.

 Zielführende Design Strategie
Zielgerichtete Ergebnisse durch Meilensteinen und KPIs wurden erfolgreich erreicht.

 Mehr Umsatz und Zeit für die wichtigen Dinge
Du konzentrierst Dich auf Dein Business, anstatt täglich Feuerlöscher zu spielen.

---

Mit fast 10 Jahren Erfahrung als Product- & UX/UI-Designer hatte ich die Möglichkeit, mit namhaften Kunden wie Mercedes-Benz, Daimler, Bosch, StepStone sowie Agenturen und Start-ups zusammenzuarbeiten.

Als Design-Generalist designe ich Deine App und B2B Softwarelösung nah und mit Deiner Zielgruppe, um Deinen ROI zu maximieren.

Name: Participatory Health
Description:
Participatory.Health is a nonprofit initiative building the consumer-led infrastructure for longitudinal health records (LHRs) — empowering individuals and families to own, organize, and contribute their complete health data to improve care, accelerate research, and advance biological understanding.

We work at the intersection of policy, interoperability, and artificial intelligence, collaborating with ONC, HL7, CARIN Alliance, academic partners, and rare-disease organizations to standardize and activate patient-contributed data (PCD) for clinical, research, and AI innovation.

Our mission is simple but transformative:

Give every person the tools and rights to make their data work for them — and for science.

Through patient-driven design, participatory research, and open standards (FHIR, TEFCA, USCDI+), we aim to make consumer data the foundation of healthcare’s next era: one defined by participation, not permission.

 Learn more: https://participatory.health

 Pourquoi nous contacter ?

• Vous voulez rendre plus moderne une infrastructure ancienne ou trop compliquée.

Description:
AlphaPrompt specializes in Large Language Model (LLM) prompt engineering, bridging the gap between what LLMs can currently do and the intricate tasks customers need them for.

There are two central challenges we address:
1) Firstly, AI safety.
Often referred to as the AI alignment problem. This is all about making sure that the text LLMs produce is safe and respects cultural, ethical, and moral standards.

2) Secondly, complex tasks.
LLMs are currently demonstrating their capabilities as chatbots. Despite human-like performance, they still require guidance when navigating complex tasks. We assure the complexity is tackled algorithmically resulting in visual output for the human supervisor.

Name: Kutlwano Holdings
Description:
Kutlwano holdings is a South African impact enterprise uniting small holder farmers, Clean Tech and Conscious consumers. We grow indigenous crops craft plant based foods and power it all with Solar 

1. The Problem We Exist to Solve
South Africa’s unemployment for 15-34 year-olds sits stubbornly above 60 %. Meanwhile the National Development Plan warns that “agriculture is the only sector that can absorb half a million new entrants before 2030”. The gap between those two statistics is where Kutlwano operates:
70 % of the continent’s uncultivated arable land is in Africa, yet the continent imports $50 bn of food it could grow.
Fresh-produce markets remain cartelised; smallholders receive <30 % of retail value.
Climate volatility has shortened the planting window by 17 days since 2000.
Township households spend 34 % of income on food, but 40 % of what is served in school feeding schemes is imported frozen veg.

We refused to accept those paradoxes. Instead we built a pipeline of solutions that converts township grit, renewable electrons and under-utilised land into competitive advantage.

Description:
Teleport Köln GmbH – Ihr Partner für digitale Infrastruktur, Edge-Computing und Innovation

Die Teleport Köln GmbH ist seit über zwei Jahrzehnten ein verlässlicher Partner für Unternehmen, die ihre digitale Infrastruktur modern, sicher und zukunftsfähig gestalten wollen. Mit Sitz im Herzen von Köln entwickeln und betreiben wir Lösungen, die den technologischen Fortschritt greifbar und nutzbar machen – pragmatisch, nachhaltig und immer auf Augenhöhe mit unseren Kunden.

Unsere Mission ist es, Komplexität zu reduzieren und Innovation zu ermöglichen. Wir helfen Unternehmen dabei, neue Technologien schnell und zuverlässig einzusetzen – von moderner Telekommunikation über Cloud-Integration bis hin zu Edge-Computing-Lösungen für Industrie 4.0, Robotik und Künstliche Intelligenz.

Mit der Übernahme der Edgizer-Plattform und ihrer Bestandskunden im Dezember 2022 von der q.beyond AG haben wir unser Portfolio gezielt erweitert. Edgizer macht Edge-Computing so einfach wie die Cloud: sicher, automatisiert und skalierbar. Damit ermöglichen wir es Unternehmen, digitale Anwendungen direkt an der Datenquelle zu betreiben, schneller zu skalieren und ihre IT-Ressourcen effizienter zu nutzen.

Unsere Werte
	•	Pragmatisch: Lösungen, die in der Praxis funktionieren.
	•	Nachhaltig: Technologie mit Verantwortung und Weitblick.
	•	Kompetent: Fachliche Tiefe kombiniert mit Erfahrung.
	•	Sympathisch: Zusammenarbeit auf Augenhöhe.

Unsere Zielgruppen
Wir unterstützen Mittelstand, Industrie und Handel, aber auch Entwickler-Communities und Systemintegratoren. Gemeinsam mit unseren Partnern schaffen wir Mehrwert durch technologische Innovation, klare Kommunikation und verlässlichen Betrieb.

Ob für sichere Netzwerke, Edge-Architekturen oder maßgeschneiderte Digitalstrategien – die Teleport Köln GmbH steht für Zukunft made in Germany.

Name: Noticero
Description:
Noticero is a smart road detection system that utilizes network-connected, sensor-heavy, smart radar devices to optimize traffic and increase road safety. 

Radar technology allows for the recognition of upcoming cars, motorbikes, bikes, pedestrians, and other vehicles regardless of weather conditions, time of day, or traffic. This data is then used to warn other road users about upcoming dangers and trigger a number of scenarios based on IFTT protocols (if this then that). 

Thanks to the implementation of additional sensors and its machine learning capabilities, Noticero will also collect and analyze real-time traffic data, noise, lights, and air pollution on behalf of cities and road operators.

Name: Beyond the Interface
Description:
Beyond the Interface is a consumer/user research and usability testing consultancy dedicated to ensuring that our clients' products and systems meet the needs of target customers for feature functionality and ease of use. Starting with our clients' vision, goals and the needs of their target audience, we guide clients through the development of a user experience and usability  strategy, and interactive innovation through collaborative consulting.

By utilizing end-user input, BTI will help clients discover new opportunities, features, functions and capabilities, as well as identify areas for improvement on existing products.  The success of any app or application is directly related to how well the development organization meets the needs of it's users and addresses a series of usability challenges.

Beyond the Interface supports our clients through product visioning workshops, target customer interviews and field observations, user performance and usability testing. BTI’s analysis of business processes and job task flow helps clients elevate their teams through usability testing, user experience (UX) and interaction design. Across markets and industries, BTI considers human factors, usability and user experience for overall project success and client satisfaction. Working with clients like Xerox, Eastman Kodak, Kodak Alaris, USAA, Guilder Lehrman Institute of American History, Lexis Nexis, Savin Corporation and DX Imaging, we have a proven track record of guiding our clients to conceive, develop, launch and maintain system and products that their users judge to be useful, effective, error free and easy to use.

Name: FutureDesign
Description:
At FutureDesign, we pioneer the integration of AI and design to promote Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) principles, with a particular focus on empowering disabled communities. Our mission is to drive industry change through innovation and inclusivity, ensuring our solutions cater to the needs of all, without exception.

We leverage Artificial Intelligence to automate design processes, ensuring rapid and innovative solutions while adhering to our commitment to sustainability by using eco-friendly printing materials. Our unique 'Customer 2 Partners' education program invites all stakeholders, especially those from disabled communities, to engage and grow with us, ensuring inclusivity is at the core of what we do.

Our services are designed with everyone in mind, providing automated helpdesk support and accessible communication mediums for individuals with disabilities, ensuring no one is left behind. We believe in lifelong learning and offer comprehensive 'How-To' guides and educational materials to all our clients, fostering an environment of continuous improvement and engagement.

Our revenue streams include direct sales of design and printing services, a subscription model for ongoing projects, and consultancy in educational design, ensuring a sustainable business model while delivering exceptional value to our clients.

We are powered by a skilled team and state-of-the-art printing machinery, supported by reliable suppliers and partners, including machine manufacturers, material suppliers, financial institutions, and courier services, ensuring we deliver on our promises efficiently and effectively.

Join us in reshaping industries through sustainable innovation and inclusive design. Visit our website or connect with us on social media to start your journey towards a more accessible and equitable world.

Name: ABRI TAMIMI DIGITAL
Description:
Abri–Tamimi Digital (ATD) helps Tanzanian organizations deliver big change on time, on budget, and with measurable impact. We combine local execution in Dar es Salaam with global standards led by a remote CTO in the UAE. Our promise is simple: efficiency through innovation governed delivery, modern systems, and data you can act on.

What we do
• Program Delivery Office (PMO-as-a-Service): Clear plans, vendor coordination, risk control, and executive reporting so initiatives stay on track.
• Digital Upgrades & Cloud: Faster, more reliable systems with practical migrations that improve resilience and reduce total cost of ownership.
• Data, BI & Automation: Management dashboards (Power BI) and targeted automation to cut manual work and speed decisions.
• Quality & Go-Live Assurance (QA/IVVQ): Independent checks so releases are safe, compliant, and audit-ready.
• Integration & Payments: Make existing systems talk to each other—securely—across banking, telecoms, and government services.
• Managed Services & Skills Transfer: We operate what we build and upskill Tanzanian teams to own it confidently.

Who we serve
Banks & fintechs, government & regulators, energy & utilities (power, water, LPG/clean cooking), telecoms, and high-growth enterprises.

Why ATD
• Governed delivery that reduces delays, surprises, and waste.
• Pragmatic modernization that pays for itself.
• Executive-grade transparency: monthly scorecards, KPIs, and benefits tracking.
• Local talent development: creating skilled Tanzanian jobs and capabilities.

How we engage
Start with a short, fixed-fee Diagnostic (2–4 weeks), deliver Quick Wins (4–8 weeks), then scale to multi-quarter programs with clear milestones and ROI.

Specialties
PMO & portfolio governance, app modernization (.NET/SharePoint), Microsoft Azure cloud, DevSecOps & QA/IVVQ, API/integration & payments, Power BI dashboards, RPA/automation, managed squads & support.

Let’s turn your roadmap into measurable results

Name: FALVED IT
Description:
At Falved IT Consulting, we believe data governance should be more than policies on paper — it should be a practical, working part of how organizations create value from their data. Our mission is to help businesses take control of their data assets by implementing a data governance framework that is pragmatic, actionable, and designed for real-world adoption.

With deep expertise in data cataloging, metadata management, data quality, and stewardship operating models, we bridge the gap between strategy and execution. We’ve supported organizations in creating and implementing data governance frameworks, implementing platforms like Microsoft Purview, Atlan, and Collibra, defining data quality rules and monitoring, and enabling business data stewards to take ownership of their data.

What sets Falved apart is our focus on delivery and adoption. We don’t just recommend governance practices — we embed them directly into business and technical processes, ensuring policies are understood, tools are fully utilized, and governance becomes a natural extension of daily operations.

Our services cover the full spectrum of data governance needs:

Governance Frameworks & Policies – Tailored to each organization’s structure and goals.

Data Catalog Implementation – Designing metadata models, building glossaries, creating lineage and improving data discoverability and contextualization.

Data Quality Management – Defining, applying, and automating rules to improve completeness, accuracy and consistency.

Stewardship Enablement – Training and coaching business data owners to manage their domains effectively.

Compliance Alignment – Ensuring governance supports both business goals and regulatory obligations.

From energy and retail to financial services, we’ve helped enterprises reduce data risk, improve trust, and unlock insights by making governance practical, useful, and impactful.

At Falved, we turn governance into business value — one hands-on initiative at a time.
